items.title: 治愈系助眠指南九宫格
items.summary: 治愈系助眠指南九宫格 - GPT IMG2 图像生成提示词
items.contentChinese:
生成一张适合小红书发布的 3:4 竖版九宫格海报，整体为 3列 × 3行 排版，九个宫格边界清晰，方便后期直接切割成 9 张单图发布。整体风格干净、高级、统一，适合女性向健康生活方式内容，具有小红书爆款封面气质。画面要求 信息排版清晰、文字大、可读性强、留白舒服、配色温柔治愈。

整体视觉风格：
奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色为主色调，搭配少量深棕色文字，ins风、治愈感、睡眠疗愈主题，简约排版，轻拟物插画点缀，可加入枕头、月亮、星星、热牛奶、香薰、书本、眼罩、窗帘、床铺等元素。整体像专业新媒体设计图，字体工整，适合做知识科普类小红书九宫格。
排版要求：

整张图必须是标准九宫格构图，切分后每一格都能独立成图

每个宫格内容完整居中，不要把标题或正文压在分割线附近
每个格子之间保留明显间隔或细边框，保证裁切后不影响阅读
所有文字使用中文，清晰易读，不要乱码，不要英文
每个宫格都像独立的小红书图文卡片，但视觉风格保持统一
画面精致、真实、自然，不要廉价营销感，不要过度花哨
九宫格具体内容：

第1格（封面）
大标题：让你倒头就睡的8个 tips
副标题：失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏
封面视觉最吸睛，适合做首图，加入柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩等治愈睡眠元素，标题突出，排版高级。

第2格
标题：1. 睡前1小时别玩手机
正文：蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。
配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情的小插画
第3格
标题：2. 睡前把灯光调暗
正文：暖光环境能帮助身体进入“准备睡觉”的状态。
配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
第4格
标题：3. 房间温度别太高
正文：稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。
配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
第5格
标题：4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡
正文：咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。
配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号

第6格
标题：5. 睡前洗个热水澡
正文：能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。
配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
第7格
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来
正文：把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。
配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
第8格
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
第9格
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。
底部小字：收藏这组，今晚试试看
配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星

画质要求：
高清，高级排版，杂志感，真实可发布，新媒体运营审美，小红书爆款图文风格，文字布局规整，适合直接切图。
items.contentEnglish:
Generate a 3:4 vertical 9-grid poster suitable for publishing on Xiaohongshu, with an overall layout of 3 columns × 3 rows. The boundaries of the nine grids are clear, making it easy to directly cut into 9 single images for later publishing. The overall style is clean, premium, and unified, suitable for female-oriented healthy lifestyle content, possessing the vibe of a viral Xiaohongshu cover. Image requirements: clear information layout, large text, strong readability, comfortable white space, gentle and healing color palette.

Overall visual style:
Cream white, light beige, light oat color, and light caramel color as the main color tones, paired with a small amount of dark brown text. Ins style, healing sense, sleep therapy theme, minimalist layout, light skeuomorphic illustration embellishments. Elements such as pillows, moons, stars, hot milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, and beds can be added. The overall look should be like a professional new media design graphic, with neat fonts, suitable for a knowledge-based popular science Xiaohongshu 9-grid.

Layout requirements:
The entire image must be a standard 9-grid composition, and each grid can stand alone as an independent image after being cut.
The content of each grid should be completely centered; do not place titles or body text near the dividing lines.
Keep obvious gaps or thin borders between each grid to ensure that reading is not affected after cropping.
All text must use Chinese, be clear and readable, no garbled characters, no English.
Each grid should look like an independent Xiaohongshu image-and-text card, but the visual style must remain unified.
The image should be exquisite, realistic, and natural, without a cheap marketing feel, and not overly flashy.

Specific content of the 9-grid:

Grid 1 (Cover)
Main title: 8 tips to make you fall asleep instantly
Subtitle: Insomniacs and night owls must save this
The cover visuals should be the most eye-catching, suitable for the first image. Add healing sleep elements such as soft beds, moons, pillows, and eye masks. The title should be prominent with a premium layout.

Grid 2
Title: 1. Don't play with your phone 1 hour before bed
Body text: Blue light makes the brain more awake; the more you scroll, the harder it is to fall asleep.
Image elements: Mobile phone, moon, small illustration of a sleepy expression

Grid 3
Title: 2. Dim the lights before bed
Body text: A warm light environment can help the body enter a "ready to sleep" state.
Image elements: Bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains

Grid 4
Title: 3. Don't keep the room temperature too high
Body text: Keeping it a bit cooler makes it easier to fall asleep quickly.
Image elements: Air conditioner, thermometer, quilt

Grid 5
Title: 4. Don't drink strong tea or coffee at night
Body text: Caffeine delays sleepiness, making you lie in bed for a long time unable to sleep.
Image elements: Coffee cup, teacup, prohibition sign

Grid 6
Title: 5. Take a hot shower before bed
Body text: It can relax the body and help you fall asleep faster.
Image elements: Bathroom steam, towel, hot water

Grid 7
Title: 6. Write it down if your brain won't stop
Body text: Writing down your worries and to-do lists makes it easier for your brain to relax.
Image elements: Notebook, fountain pen, small desk lamp

Grid 8
Title: 7. Fix your bedtime
Body text: Going to bed at about the same time every day will make your biological clock increasingly stable.
Image elements: Clock, moon, bed

Grid 9
Title: 8. Try deep breathing relaxation
Body text: Inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds, exhale for 6 seconds, and sleepiness will gradually come.
Bottom small text: Save this set and try it tonight
Image elements: Breathing lines, person with closed eyes, stars

Image quality requirements:
High definition, premium layout, magazine feel, realistically publishable, new media operation aesthetics, Xiaohongshu viral image-and-text style, neat text layout, suitable for direct image cutting.

items.contentChinese:
【背景与骨架线条】
纯黑深邃底色，一条粗壮有力的墨色书法S型曲线自画面一端蜿蜒贯穿至另一端，笔触苍劲，墨迹浓淡有致，如大写意行笔，构成整幅画面的视觉骨架与叙事动线。
【主体：透明燕子】
曲线上方，一只展翅飞翔的画眉鸟占据视觉核心；身体呈玻璃透明质感，内部映射传统建筑群叠影，蓝绿色光流在透明羽翼间流转折射，仿佛时间长河与文明记忆凝缩其中；轮廓以极细金线勾边，增强立体感与神圣感。
【中景：古典建筑序列】
燕子下方，沿墨线曲线错落分布广州的各种风景名胜：白云山、陈家祠、双子塔、广州塔、猎德大桥、海珠塔依次浮现；主色调青绿与淡金，建筑细节清晰，琉璃瓦、飞檐翘角、石阶回廊；木棉花簇拥点缀于建筑周围，花瓣随风轻散，静谧而悠远；几朵水墨云朵轻盈飘浮其间，增添空灵层次。
【前景：白鹤与水面】
前景湖畔：数只白鹤或静立水边、或振翅腾飞，姿态各异，优雅从容；浅蓝湖面如镜，倒影荡漾，波光细碎，营造宁静氛围。
【远景：山峦】
远处山峦层叠起伏，青黛色晕染，墨色由浓至淡，朦胧氤氲，富有水墨层次；与前景形成近实远虚的空间纵深。
【构图与光影】
非线性透视构图，墨线曲线为叙事主轴，古今元素沿线嵌入；光源自画面中心向外辐射扩散，形成强烈明暗对比，中心亮、四周渐暗；冷色调主导（深蓝、青绿、银白），暖色点缀（樱花粉、淡金），和谐而神秘；东方美学与现代意象交融，超现实诗意意境。
【技术规格】
8K超高清渲染，极致细节精度，最佳画质，比例 9:16

items.title: 机甲少女立于废弃海城
items.summary: 机甲少女立于废弃海城 - GPT IMG2 图像生成提示词
items.contentChinese:
一名十几岁的机甲少女，苍白的肌肤上沾着烟尘与海水飞沫，锐利的琥珀色眼眸中映出发光的 HUD 瞄准标线；及腰的灰白色长发扎成高马尾，在海风中肆意飞扬。哑光枪灰色外骨骼装甲覆盖双肩、前臂与小腿，关节处裸露着液压活塞，胸挂布有发光的青蓝色冷却管线。一件沾着油污的超大号机库外套半滑落在一侧肩头，一门巨型轨道炮架在右肩，衣领处挂着士兵牌与磨损的红色丝带。
她站在向左略微偏移的位置，立于倾斜钢铁平台的锈蚀边缘，平台向外延伸至漆黑海面之上；重心落在单腿上，左手紧握炮带，头部微转向镜头，投来沉静而桀骜的目光。背部推进器不断喷出蒸汽，马尾与外套在咸腥海风里向一侧狂乱飘动。
背景是黄昏时分广袤的废弃海上都市，用途不明的巨型超级建筑从海洋中拔地而起，形成错落的剪影；骨白色的巨型塔楼与附着藤壶的钢铁结构融为一体，巨大的环形建筑以破碎的角度倾斜矗立，锈蚀的桁架骨架间缠绕着废弃线缆，深色浪涛在支撑柱间翻涌，数艘沉船半淹在柱脚。厚重的海雾萦绕在建筑底部，高耸的结构直刺入暗沉的天空，塔楼高处零星闪烁着微弱灯光，宛如遥远的眼眸。
画面采用阴郁低调的光影：阴沉天空透出冷调青蓝环境光，画面右侧远处建筑漏出温暖的琥珀色钠灯光晕，塔楼后方低垂的太阳形成强烈逆光，勾勒出她的轮廓；体积光穿透海雾，装甲上呈现湿润的镜面高光。
镜头使用 35mm 变形宽银幕镜头，略微低角度仰拍，越过她的肩膀望向远处建筑群；中全景构图，浅景深使前景的锈蚀景物虚化，带有横向镜头眩光，细腻的大气薄雾将远处巨型建筑压缩为层次分明的剪影。
整体为电影感动漫主视觉风格，绘画感数字插画搭配利落线稿，采用青蓝、骨白与铁锈色为主的低饱和海洋色调，点缀少量暖色调高光；添加胶片颗粒，呈现高对比度的艺术海报质感，画幅比例 16:9。

items.contentChinese:
新中式水墨山水海报，竖版9:16构图，东方极简美学风格，
大面积留白，整体色调为春日清晨氛围（青绿色、雾蓝、淡灰、浅墨），低饱和、清透柔和，高级质感。
画面主体为奇峻巍峨的群山，从中间平静湖面的两侧拔地而起，占据左右两侧画面，
山体以水墨晕染表现，浓淡干湿变化丰富，局部融入淡青绿色渲染，体现春意生机。
山峰被湿润轻柔的晨雾包裹，雾气层层递进，与浅青蓝天空自然融合，形成空气透视与空间纵深。

湖面如镜面般平静，呈现微青绿色调，倒映山体与天空，反射略带柔焦与雾化扩散效果，增强春日湿润与梦幻氛围。
中景一艘带弧形篷顶的小木舟缓慢漂浮，船桨轻触水面形成细腻涟漪，水纹自然扩散，整体保持极静状态。

船上为一位红衣渔女，体量较小（远景比例），人物简化处理为水墨剪影 + 轻微设色，
身着低饱和朱砂红传统服饰（非鲜艳红），颜色略被雾气柔化，
人物面部不刻画细节，仅保留轮廓与姿态（如轻扶船篷或执桨），
红色在水面形成淡淡倒影，作为画面唯一暖色视觉焦点。

岸边点缀疏林与春季新生植被，采用淡墨 + 淡青绿点染，虚实结合，增强节奏与生命气息。

少量飞鸟在远空掠过，轻盈疏散分布，增强空间层次与灵动感。

画面顶部居中竖排书法：“东方美学”，采用传统手写行书或行草风格（王羲之笔意），
笔触自然起伏、提按分明，带飞白与墨韵扩散效果，避免字体感。
书法颜色为深墨青或柔和墨黑，与整体画面统一。
整体风格：水墨 + 现代极简设计融合，春日禅意、空灵湿润、宁静氛围，
冷暖对比克制，电影感光影，高级艺术海报质感，8K超清细节。

Neo-Chinese ink wash landscape poster, vertical 9:16 composition, Oriental minimalist aesthetic style,
Large area of negative space, overall color tone is spring morning atmosphere (cyan-green, misty blue, light gray, light ink), low saturation, clear and soft, high-end texture.
The main subject of the picture is steep and majestic mountains, rising from both sides of the calm lake in the middle, occupying the left and right sides of the picture,
The mountain bodies are expressed with ink wash blending, rich in changes of shades, dryness and wetness, partially integrated with light cyan-green rendering, reflecting the vitality of spring.
The mountain peaks are wrapped in moist and gentle morning mist, the mist progresses layer by layer, naturally blending with the light cyan-blue sky, forming aerial perspective and spatial depth.
The lake surface is as calm as a mirror, showing a slightly cyan-green tone, reflecting the mountains and the sky, the reflection slightly has a soft focus and atomization diffusion effect, enhancing the spring moist and dreamy atmosphere.
In the midground, a small wooden boat with an arched canopy floats slowly, the oars lightly touch the water surface to form delicate ripples, the water patterns spread naturally, maintaining an extremely quiet state overall.
On the boat is a fisherwoman in red, with a small volume (distant view proportion), the character is simplified into an ink wash silhouette + slight coloring,
wearing a low-saturation cinnabar red traditional costume (not bright red), the color is slightly softened by the mist,
no facial details are depicted for the character, only retaining the outline and posture (such as gently holding the boat canopy or holding the oar),
the red color forms a faint reflection on the water surface, serving as the only warm color visual focus in the picture.
The shore is dotted with sparse woods and spring newborn vegetation, using light ink + light cyan-green dot dyeing, combining virtuality and reality, enhancing rhythm and breath of life.
A small number of flying birds skim across the distant sky, distributed lightly and loosely, enhancing the spatial layers and sense of agility.
At the top center of the picture, vertical calligraphy: "Oriental Aesthetics", adopting traditional handwritten running script or running-cursive style (intention of Wang Xizhi's brushwork),
brushstrokes naturally undulate, lifting and pressing are distinct, with flying white and ink rhyme diffusion effects, avoiding a sense of font.
The calligraphy color is dark ink cyan or soft ink black, unified with the overall picture.
Overall style: ink wash + modern minimalist design fusion, spring Zen, ethereal and moist, tranquil atmosphere,
restrained cold and warm contrast, cinematic light and shadow, high-end art poster texture, 8K ultra-clear details.

Each frame features the same young Korean female idol, maintaining 100% consistency in facial features, proportions, hairstyle, and identity across all nine shots.   Natural, ultra-realistic skin texture, no retouching, no smoothing. Clean idol-style minimal makeup, soft glow, subtle imperfections.   Hair: long, voluminous dark hair, slightly tousled, consistent across all frames (natural loose flow, slight movement).  Outfit: cohesive Korean idol photoshoot styling — white shirt + short bottoms (or simple neutral-toned outfit), youthful, clean, slightly casual but styled. Same outfit across all frames.  Setting: minimal studio or simple indoor environment (plain wall, soft window light, clean background). Focus on subject, not environment. items.contentChinese:
角色：世界级科学百科插画师兼知识图谱架构师
任务：以经典、无品牌标识（无任何 Logo）的科学百科风格，创作一幅细节极致丰富、结构极其精巧、视觉效果惊艳的「环球图解百科科学信息图」。
题材选择：从【人物、植物、动物】中任选其一。
具体对象：【例如：大王乌贼 / 列奥纳多・达・芬奇 / 红杉树】
风格：采用复古泛黄米色纸张背景，绘制精细工整的科学插画；线条细腻精致，整体繁复专业、严谨考究。
核心视觉要求
主体逼真 3D 效果
位于画面视觉中心（C 位）的主体形象，需具备极致的写实感与动态张力。营造强烈的空间纵深感，让人物、植物或动物仿佛突破画框，从平面纸张中跃出、冲向观者（效果类似变形 3D 或动态弹出效果，高精度写实呈现）。
版式布局与留白设计
主体位置：占据画面中心，周围刻意设置规划式留白，强化立体弹出效果，使其成为绝对视觉焦点。
周边模块：根据所选题材，在画面四周（上下左右及四角）排布 6–8 个独立且规整有序的知识模块。整体呈现规整的信息密度感，而非杂乱堆砌。每个模块需带有清晰边框、标题栏与详尽丰富的内容。
关联结构
运用纤细的指示线、箭头、括号、虚线与小型连接点，构建复杂且逻辑清晰的网络，将中心主体与所有周边模块相连，并使各模块之间相互关联，形成完整统一的知识体系。
文字与标注（硬性要求：必须为清晰中文）
主标题：以醒目大气、笔法优美的中文书法字体呈现具体对象名称【例如：大王乌贼】。
书法点缀：在主体画面与模块标题中，对关键术语使用工整美观的中文书法字体标注。
标准中文文本：其余所有说明文字、大量清晰中文手写注释、模块内容及注解均使用清晰可辨的简体汉字，不得出现乱码或无法识别符号，优先保证文字可读性。
指示线标注：模块内所有细小结构、细节、子模块、图表与插画，均需搭配详尽的指示线标注（仿解剖图形式），直接指向对应部位，最大化体现专业性与科普价值，做到每一处结构均有标注。
分题材模块结构（参考示例）
A. 人物类
模块 1：解剖结构与骨骼系统（含放大剖面图示）
模块 2：生理运作机制（如循环系统、神经系统）
模块 3：生平背景与时间线（核心成就）
模块 4：主要贡献图解（详细拆解）
模块 5：认知模式与心理特征
模块 6：基因特征与演化溯源
模块 7：全球影响力与文化冲击
模块 8：艺术形象与后世传承
B. 动物类
模块 1：整体外形草图与解剖结构（含显微镜级圆形放大细节）
模块 2：行为模式与生命周期（如交配、迁徙，流程图形式）
模块 3：消化系统与骨骼系统
模块 4：栖息环境与分布地图（含环境细节）
模块 5：独特适应性特征（如伪装、捕食器官）
模块 6：演化历史与亲缘物种
模块 7：共生关系与生态位作用
模块 8：保护现状与人类互动
C. 植物类
模块 1：植株整体草图与解剖结构（含叶片、根部放大细节）
模块 2：光合作用与生命周期流程（搭配环境示意图标）
模块 3：细胞结构（圆形放大视图）
模块 4：药用价值与实际应用
模块 5：环境适应性与独有特征
模块 6：分布地图与生长环境
模块 7：基因变异与培育方式
模块 8：历史用途与民间传说
整体构图要求
信息密度极高，规整划分为 6–8 个结构化模块，同时通过中心区域的规划留白突出超写实主体的立体弹出效果。风格硬核、专业、学术化，凭借动态 3D 主体实现极强视觉吸引力。
无任何百科品牌标识（如 DK 等 Logo）。
所有标注清晰可辨，所有手写注释工整可读。
主标题采用中文书法字体。
画面比例：3:4。
【主题内容】
items.contentEnglish:
Role: World-class Scientific Encyclopedia Illustrator & Knowledge Graph Architect.

Task: Generate a highly detailed, extremely intricate, and visually stunning "Universal Illustrated Encyclopedia Science Infographic" in a classic, unbranded (NO logos) scientific encyclopedia style.

Subject Matter: Choose one from [People, Plants, or Animals]. 

Specific Subject: [e.g., The Giant Squid / Leonardo da Vinci / The Sequoia Tree].

Style: Fine, detailed scientific illustration on a retro, aged beige paper background. Delicate linework. Intricately complex and professional.

Key Visual Requirements:

1.  Lifelike 3D Effect (The Central Subject): The central subject in the "C position" must be rendered with extraordinary realism and dynamism. Create a dramatic sense of depth where the character, plant, or animal appears to break the frame, leaping or bursting out of the flat paper towards the viewer (an effect similar to anamorphic 3D or dynamic pop-out, with high-precision realism).

2.  Layout & Strategic White Space:
    * Central Subject: Dominates the center, with intentional "strategic white space" around it to enhance the popping-out effect and make the figure the clear focal point.
    * Surrounding Modules: The surrounding area (left, right, top, bottom, and corners) must be filled with 6-8 distinct, highly organized knowledge modules, depending on the subject. There should be a sense of organized density, not random clutter. The modules themselves must have clear borders, headers, and extensive, detailed content.

3.  Connections: Use a complex, logical network of fine leader lines, arrows, brackets, dotted lines, and small connection points to link the central figure to all surrounding modules, and interconnect the modules themselves into a cohesive knowledge web.

4.  Text & Annotation (Hard Requirement - Must be CLEAR Chinese):
    * Main Title: A large, prominent, beautifully executed **Chinese calligraphy** (书法体) of the specific subject's name [e.g., "大王乌贼"].
    * Calligraphic Accents: Scattered throughout the main content and module titles, use beautiful, clear Chinese calligraphy for important terms.
    * Standard Chinese Text: All other descriptive text, handwritten notes (大量清晰中文手写注释), module content, and annotations must be clear, legible Chinese characters (简体中文), not gibberish or unreadable symbols. Ensure text clarity is prioritized.
    * Leader Line Annotations: Every single small component, detail, submodule, diagram, or illustration within the modules must have detailed leader line annotations (拟解剖图) pointing directly to it for maximum professionalism and educational value. Every part should be labeled.

Subject-Specific Module Structure (Example for general reference):

A. For Humans [People]:
   - Module 1: Anatomy & Skeletal Structure (w/ magnified cross-sections)
   - Module 2: Physiological Processes (e.g., Circulatory/Nervous System)
   - Module 3: Historical Context & Timeline (Key Achievements)
   - Module 4: Major Contribution Diagram (Detailed breakdown)
   - Module 5: Cognitive Process / Psychological Insight
   - Module 6: Genetic Profile / Evolution
   - Module 7: Global Influence & Cultural Impact
   - Module 8: Cultural Representations / Legacy

B. For Animals:
   - Module 1: Full External Sketch & Anatomy (w/ microscope magnified detail circular windows)
   - Module 2: Behavioral Patterns & Lifecycle (e.g., Mating/Migration, Flowchart style)
   - Module 3: Digestive & Skeletal System
   - Module 4: Habitats & Distribution Map (with environmental details)
   - Module 5: Unique Adaptations (e.g., camouflage, hunting tools)
   - Module 6: Evolutionary History & Relatives
   - Module 7: Symbiotic Relationships / Ecosystem Role
   - Module 8: Conservation Status & Human Interaction

C. For Plants:
   - Module 1: Full Plant Sketch & Anatomy (w/ magnified leaf/root details)
   - Module 2: Photosynthesis & Lifecycle Flow (w/ icons for environment)
   - Module 3: Cellular Structure (Magnified circular views)
   - Module 4: Medicinal Properties / Practical Applications (as in original original prompt)
   - Module 5: Environmental Adaptations / Unique Features
   - Module 6: Distribution Map & Environmental Context
   - Module 7: Genetic Variations & Cultivation
   - Module 8: Historical Usage & Folklore

Overall Composition: Extremely dense with information, organized into 6-8 structured modules, but balanced with strategic empty space around the center to allow the main, hyper-realistic figure to pop. Hard-core, professional, academic, but visually engaging due to the dynamic 3D central figure. No branding from any specific encyclopedia (e.g., no "DK" logos). All annotations must be legible. All handwritten notes must be clear. Main titles in Chinese calligraphy. Aspect Ratio: 3:4.

items.title: 极简命运星盘塔罗AI海报教程
items.summary: 用AI生成极简剪影风“命运星盘/塔罗”海报，强调轮廓、金属花纹质感与符号绑定角色。
items.contentChinese:
核心逻辑是把角色彻底抽象成剪影，把叙事压力全部丢给背后的占星符号系统。比起复杂的人物立绘，这种处理方式反而更能体现角色的宿命感。

创作关键在于： 

剪影并非纯黑，而是保留极低饱和的深色倾向，只用轮廓去撑辨识度。👇

根据【角色/主题】生成一张收藏级极简命运星盘 / 塔罗海报。画面中央为该角色巨大、优雅、完整的人物剪影式主视觉，整体保留强烈剪影感，但不是纯黑剪影，而是带有角色主题色倾向的低饱和、有色、偏暗的半剪影；内部只保留非常克制的颜色层次、轻微渐变与微弱辉光，不做完整上色立绘。人物主要通过轮廓、姿态、发型、服饰外形与标志性配饰体现角色辨识度，不强调具体五官，不在剪影内部填充场景，不做叙事拼贴。   

人物背后自动生成与【角色】高度匹配的专属星盘 / 命盘系统，包括同心圆、星轨、黄道刻度、星座连线、月相、神秘符号、几何占星纹样、象征徽记与少量装饰细节。所有配色、纹样、符号系统、装饰元素、材质倾向与光感氛围，全部根据【角色】的身份、气质、能力、阵营、元素属性、世界观与命运感自动推演生成，必须强绑定角色本身，不得模板化。

整体采用严格对称、完整克制的收藏版塔罗牌构图，具有完整边框、角饰、顶部编号区、中部主视觉区、底部角色名铭牌与箴言区。风格融合塔罗构图、新艺术装饰风格、神秘学符号设计与高级极简电影海报审美，整体庄重、神圣、安静、精致、宿命、诗意，具有收藏感与专属感。

整体质感应干净、通透、锐利、精工、华丽，装饰线条清晰细腻，可带有微弱辉光、星尘、能量光纹或金属饰线感；不要纸张纹理，不要纸绘感，不要古旧纸面，不要印刷噪点，不要版画肌理，不要手稿感，不要做旧质感。

画面文字自然融入版式：顶部可有罗马数字或命运编号，中下部呈现【角色】名字，底部加入一句与角色气质高度契合的命运箴言 / 神谕短句，简洁、克制、诗性，像专属于该角色的命运注解。

不要复杂场景，不要剪影内部叙事，不要额外人物，不要模板化背景，不要现代UI，不要廉价奇幻素材，不要过度拥挤，不要失去留白，不要普通角色插画感，不要纯黑剪影，不要完整厚涂立绘感。

竖版 3:4，高清，收藏级，高完成度，精致细节。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt
Generate a collectible minimalist destiny astrolabe / Tarot poster based on [Character/Theme]. The central visual is a huge, elegant, complete character silhouette-style main image, maintaining a strong silhouette feel overall, but not a pure black silhouette—instead, a low-saturation, colored, dark-leaning semi-silhouette with tendencies toward the character's theme colors; internally, retain only very restrained color layers, subtle gradients, and faint glows, without full-color detailed illustrations. 美术风格要求：高完成度的日系二维插画，质感类似女性向手游角色卡——华美、繁复、梦幻、精致；具有电影级的光影与阴影、柔焦效果、镜头光晕、闪耀粒子、飘落花瓣、细腻的皮肤纹理、精致的发丝层次；高端服装设计；以及带有戏剧性张力的面部表情。

构图要求：竖版海报布局，融合半身镜头与特写细节；女主角居中，其余男性角色从上左、上右、下左、下右等位置环绕，营造视觉包围感与情感强烈氛围；角色之间的视线连接清晰，所有情绪都汇聚到女主角身上。

背景要求：宫殿、议事厅、用于国际局势的隐喻空间、权力中心、战争与秩序的象征性环境——但以浪漫化、奇幻化的方式呈现；避免写实新闻照片风格，而是为恋爱游戏打造被戏剧化过的世界观背景。

排版要求：在画面中融入中文游戏海报文字元素，包括主标题、副标题、角色姓名、配音演员署名（CV）、角色台词、 “预先预约现已开启” 文案，以及应用商店风格的按钮。整体布局应模仿上线前的手游宣传海报——精致且统一，避免杂乱。
items.contentEnglish:

Overall concept: Multiple male characters exuding a strong sense of power, leadership aura, and mature charisma, revolving around a single female protagonist in a complex web of emotional and political intrigue-filled love rivalries. The composition isn't a standard group portrait but a typical official KV poster for a female-oriented romance mobile game: All male characters approach the female lead from different directions, creating intricate tensions of protection, intense gazes, possessiveness, restrained deep affection, and dangerously ambiguous vibes. The female lead is positioned at the visual center, with a temperament that's intelligent, composed, and elegant—both like a diplomatic core figure and the singular heroine in an otome game who captivates everyone.

Art style requirements: High-finish Japanese 2D illustration, with the textured quality of female-oriented mobile game character cards—beautiful, ornate, dreamy, exquisite, featuring cinematic lighting and shadows, soft focus, lens flares, sparkling particles, floating petals, finely detailed skin textures, intricate hair strands, high-end clothing designs, and facial expressions with dramatic tension.

Composition requirements: Vertical poster layout, blending half-body shots with close-up details; the female lead centered, with other male characters encircling from positions like upper left, upper right, lower left, lower right, etc., to form a sense of visual encirclement and emotional intensity; clear sightline connections between characters, with all emotions converging on the female lead.

Background requirements: Palace, council chamber, metaphorical space for international situations, power center, symbolic environment of war and order—but rendered in a romanticized, fantastical way; avoid a realistic news photo style, instead crafting a dramatized worldview background for a romance game.

items.title: 双曝光照片网格致敬海报教程
items.summary: 用GPT图像生成高端体育致敬海报：黑白肖像剪影+照片马赛克纹理与微缩排版。
items.contentChinese:
[人物姓名]。
扮演高端体育平面设计师，创作概念性致敬海报。风格为复杂的“双曝光照片网格合成”，采用混合媒介纹理。
中央结构（容器）：
中心焦点是[人物姓名]的大型高对比黑白肖像剪影。这幅主肖像作为容器。
网格填充与纹理（混合媒介）：
剪影内部填充着密集的“照片马赛克网格”，展示人物职业生涯中的动作照片。
关键纹理指导：不要仅仅粘贴平面照片。在不同网格单元上应用艺术纹理，营造有触感的拼贴感。使用以下效果：
半色调点：部分单元格上的漫画书风格光栅图案。
面料/刺绣：细腻的线或帆布纹理，暗示球衣或补丁。
胶片颗粒：特定高对比度动作镜头中出现强烈噪点。
色彩策略：
基底为单色黑白。仅在特定网格单元格上使用与球队/旗帜相关的选择性色彩叠加，以营造节奏感。
排版与品牌（严格微缩放）：左
上角（名称）：严格使用Inter Semibold字体写入“[人物姓名]”。字距调整：紧密的负字距调整（-4%）。
尺寸：小且低调。必须占据画布宽度的最大20%。切勿做得大或大。
右上角（符号）：放置主标志（球队/品牌/旗帜）。
尺寸：非常小。它必须占据画布宽度的最大10%。
构图与背景：
背景：米白色或浅灰色，带有明显的高品质纸张或混凝土纹理。不应是平面数字白色。
对齐：将人物完美居中。保持物体周围宽阔的负空间。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
[PERSON NAME].
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of [PERSON NAME]. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "[PERSON NAME]" strictly using the font Inter Semibold.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.

items.title: 东方史诗海报自动叙事生成

items.contentChinese:
根据{少妇白洁}自动生成一张 收藏版史诗叙事海报，

巨大优雅的{白洁}人物侧脸剪影作为外轮廓，剪影内部自动生长出最契合该主题的完整世界观、标志性场景、角色关系、象征符号、关键建筑、生物、道具与氛围。

整体不是普通拼贴，而是高级的剪影轮廓填充式叙事合成，带有双重曝光式联想，但强化为电影级叙事表达与空间调度。

电影海报风格 + 东方现实主义美学融合，强调真实物理光影、镜头语言、空间纵深与叙事层级。

光影采用电影级侧逆光与局部暖光点缀，冷暖对比克制真实，加入体积光与轻雾增强空间感。

材质表现为真实质感（建筑、丝绸、肌肤、石材），避免纯绘画笔触感，

保留柔和空气透视，但优化为电影级景深与焦点控制。

轻微胶片颗粒，边缘飞白与刷痕改为电影式柔和融合过渡，

大面积留白，版式克制高级，安静、宏大、克制、宿命感强的东方电影叙事。

所有元素必须强绑定主题，一眼识别，不要杂乱，不要硬拼贴，不要模板化背景，不要廉价奇幻素材。
items.contentEnglish:
Generate an archival epic narrative poster automatically based on {Young Woman Bai Jie},
featuring a massive, elegant silhouette of the {Bai Jie} character in profile as the outer contour, with the interior of the silhouette automatically growing into a complete worldview, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic icons, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere that best fit the theme.
The overall composition is not a mere collage, but an advanced silhouette-contour-filled narrative synthesis, incorporating double-exposure-style associations, yet intensified into cinematic-level narrative expression and spatial orchestration.
Cinematic poster style fused with Eastern realist aesthetics, emphasizing authentic physical lighting and shadows, cinematographic language, spatial depth, and narrative layering.
Lighting and shadows employ cinematic sidelight and reverse light with localized warm light accents, maintaining restrained realism through cool-warm contrasts, incorporating volumetric light and light mist to enhance spatial depth.
Material rendering features authentic textures (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding purely painterly brushstroke effects,
retaining soft aerial perspective, but optimized for cinematic depth of field and focus control.
Subtle film grain, with edge feathering and brush marks transformed into cinematic soft fusion transitions,
extensive use of negative space, with a restrained and sophisticated layout, evoking a quiet, grand, restrained, and fateful Eastern cinematic narrative.
All elements must be strongly tied to the theme for instant recognition, avoiding clutter, forced collages, templated backgrounds, or cheap fantasy assets.

items.title: 掌纹玄学与中医指纹解读
items.summary: 基于易经与中医学的掌纹/指纹要点逐线标注，含预警与十点以上解读。
items.contentChinese: 给你这个掌纹。请通过中国的玄学、指纹分析，以及一些中医学理论，顶级算命大师的技术帮我分析这个人的手纹。 请用这种线条标记写明每个要点，能够对他的命运有所预示。要求如下： 1. 采用易经或中医学理论分析, 要有预警和精准分析，要让用户觉得准。 2. 标明各个线条的关键点 3. 最少提供十个点的分析报告
items.contentEnglish:
Here is this palm print. Please use Chinese metaphysics, fingerprint-pattern analysis, and some theories from traditional Chinese medicine to let a top fortune-teller’s techniques help me analyze this person’s hand lines. Please use line-by-line markings to clearly indicate each key point, so that it can foretell something about this person’s destiny. Requirements as follows:  
1. Use I Ching or traditional Chinese medicine theories for analysis, include warnings and precise analysis, and make the user feel it’s accurate.  
2. Indicate the key points of each line.  
3. Provide at least ten points in the analysis report.

items.title: GPT Image 2 数学可视化提示词模板
items.summary: 提供可复用的GPT Image 2数学信息图提示词模板，强调直观结构与学术排版风格。适合生成清晰不杂乱的讲义式海报。
items.contentChinese:
> 请创作一张关于「【数学概念/知识点】」的数学可视化信息图，目标是帮助读者直观理解：它是什么、为什么成立、几何/结构直觉是什么、在不同场景下如何表现。画面要像高质量数学讲义 + 手绘教育海报，优雅、清晰、信息丰富，但不要杂乱。
>
> 视觉风格：竖版或横版均可，干净的浅色纸张背景，深蓝标题，黑色/深灰正文线条，搭配少量优雅的蓝色、青绿色、金色、红色强调色。使用圆角卡片、细线边框、编号标签、手绘箭头、局部放大框和总结栏。整体要美观、平衡、有学术感，让人一眼看懂这个概念的“结构”和“为什么”。
items.contentEnglish:
Please create a math visualization infographic about “【mathematical concept/knowledge point】” to help readers intuitively understand: what it is, why it holds, what the geometric/structural intuition is, and how it appears in different scenarios. The artwork should look like a high-quality math lecture handout + a hand-drawn educational poster—elegant, clear, and information-rich, but not cluttered.

Visual style: vertical or horizontal layout is fine. Use a clean light paper background, with a dark-blue title, black/dark-gray body text, and a few tasteful accent colors in blue, teal-green, gold, and red. Employ rounded cards, thin-line borders, numbered labels, hand-drawn arrows, inset zoom boxes, and a summary panel. Overall, make it beautiful, balanced, and academic—so that people can understand the concept’s “structure” and “why” at a glance.

items.title: Seedance 2.0 用参考图驱动舞蹈动画

items.contentChinese:
我使用动作分镜表作为参考图像，使用 Seedance 2.0 + GPT 图像 2.0 为舞蹈制作动画  
GPT 图像 2.0 提示词： [STYLE]  
单色灰度插画，3D 渲染角色，清晰的教学参考分镜表，  
白色背景，漫画式分格网格布局，技术示意图美学

4x4 网格布局，共 16 个分格，每个分格由细黑色边框分隔，  
单元格编号从 1 到 16，分格尺寸一致

短上衣和宽松长裤，运动鞋，所有分格中为同一角色

左上：粗体数字徽章 + 韩文标题文字  
中心：全身角色姿势插画  
左下：韩文描述文字（3-4 行）

弧形箭头、直线箭头、圆形旋转指示器，  
放置在角色周围以展示动作流程与方向

高细节 3D 雕塑风格，柔和的棚拍灯光，细微阴影，

items.contentEnglish:
Modern Oriental Decorative Thick-Paint Portrait Style｜Mythical Character Poster Series  
One point to note is that the character type will affect how the person’s style is presented. You need to add a description in 【Character/Theme】.  

【Character/Theme】 is only for visual reference. Preserve the core identifying traits and translate everything consistently into the Modern Oriental Decorative thick-paint portrait style, combining Galang’s manner of character abstraction and deformation, Lin Fengmian’s Oriental lyrical decorative sensibility, and the Dunhuang mineral-color aesthetics. A half-body mythological character portrait: a slender, elegant Oriental oval face, simplified and sparsely spaced features, clean facial negative space, long, upturned eyes, and an air that is ancient yet restrained.  

The overall composition is governed by large color blocks. Complete block areas establish the major relationships among the hair, face, clothing, and background; bright areas, gray areas, and dark areas are unified clearly, with edges tightened and loosened appropriately. Use a soft yet bright unified light source; overall brightness is medium to high. The illuminated surfaces of the subject’s face, neck and shoulders, chest area, and upper body are clear and clean. The subject’s overall brightness is noticeably higher than the background.  

Refine the shaping of the face, skin, and hair. The main areas for detailed painting are the eyes, headdress, shoulder armor, gemstones, and gold-colored patterns; the hem, ribbons, and background are rendered more loosely and suggestively.  

Color uses pure, luminous mineral tones such as soft ochre-red, light cinnabar, misty stone-blue, soft jade-green, light ancient gold, misty blue, rice-white, and ivory-white. The saturation is low but the brightness is moderate, creating a gorgeous and transparent effect.  

The background is a medium-brightness paper or silk texture base, or a matte pigment ground; you may add a small number of totem motifs, cloud patterns, plants, or symbolic elements.  

Art poster layout: vertical Chinese title, a small amount of English microtext, and naturally include the signature “

items.title: GPT图像2角色海报设计方法
items.summary: 用ChatGPT的GPT image 2生成统一9:16竖版角色KV。通过双重曝光与留白叙事，打造辨识度与层次。
items.contentChinese:
使用 ChatGPT 上的 GPT image 2 创建：  
一个角色宣传海报，标题为“输入姓名”，采用统一的纵向关键视觉构图（9:16）。每张海报遵循由大到小的上下层级结构：上半部分呈现角色最具辨识度的元素（头部、面部轮廓、面具或上半身剪影）作为主导的超大视觉，占据压倒性的尺寸，形成高度可识别的剪影。中下部分以次要主体呈现完整角色，展示为稳定站立姿势或带有细微的动作，从而确立构图的视觉核心。  

在大剪影内部以及角色周围，运用双重曝光与拼贴式叙事构图。多场景、象征性意象、小型角色互动、支撑元素与环境细节被层叠并融合进雾气、宣纸渲染与留白中。左右两侧包含互补的次要元素，以营造叙事张力与空间变化。从上到下延展的一条连续流动的视觉线，将主角色、内部拼贴与上方的大剪影连接起来，增强整体连贯性并引导观者视线。  

整体构图保留大面积留白。边缘以墨色扩散、柔和虚化与破碎的过渡进行处理，形成一种受东方审美启发的“存在”与“缺席”之间的平衡。风格统一、精炼且克制，强调层次感、叙事性、强烈的视觉冲击力，以及一致的系列化海报语言。
items.contentEnglish:
Created with GPT image 2 on ChatGPT:
A character promotional poster titled “INPUT NAME,” designed in a unified vertical key visual composition (9:16). Each poster follows a hierarchy of large top and smaller bottom structure: the upper half features the most recognizable element of the character (head, facial contour, mask, or upper-body silhouette) as a dominant oversized visual, forming a highly identifiable silhouette. The middle to lower section contains the full character as a secondary subject, shown in a stable standing pose or with subtle movement, establishing the visual core of the composition.
Inside the large silhouette and around the character, use a double-exposure and collage-style narrative composition. Multiple scenes, symbolic imagery, small character interactions, supporting elements, and environmental details are layered and blended into mist, ink wash, and negative space. The left and right sides include complementary secondary elements to create narrative tension and spatial variation. A continuous flowing visual line runs from top to bottom, connecting the main character, internal collage, and the large upper silhouette, enhancing cohesion and guiding the viewer’s eye.
The overall composition preserves large areas of negative space. Edges are treated with ink diffusion, soft blurring, and fragmented transitions, creating a balance between presence and absence inspired by Eastern aesthetics. The style is cohesive, refined, and restrained, emphasizing depth, storytelling, strong visual impact, and a consistent series-style poster language.

items.contentChinese: 棕色哥特洛丽塔连衣裙，短款泡泡袖由半透明棕色蕾丝制成，层叠蕾丝袖口并饰褶边，立领高起，领口处为蕾丝荷叶边，胸前大号层叠蝴蝶结为深棕色并配以奶油色花朵装饰胸针，贴身上衣，带奶油色提花背心拼片，竖向一排小圆形纽扣，沿前片边缘与接缝处点缀精致的金色蕾丝装饰，结构化腰身配合外扩裙摆，外裙采用深巧克力棕色面料，裙摆与边缘处有华丽的金色刺绣；内裙层次可见焦橙色与奶油色拼片，带丹椰斯花纹，下摆处层叠深色蕾丝外裙，密集的花卉刺绣，波浪边蕾丝装饰，丰富的质感面料组合，包括缎、提花、蕾丝与刺绣，对称的装饰设计，优雅的复古欧洲风格，高度细致的服装结构，无配饰

items.title: 开源赚钱ID照提示词模板
items.summary: 提供可用于生成商务半身证件照海报的开源提示词，并说明1:1效果与信息栏排版规则。
items.contentChinese:
请基于我上传的人像照片生成一张正式商务档案头像海报。保留人物真实身份特征、五官比例、脸型基础和整体气质，不要改变人物身份。

可以适度优化面部轮廓，使脸部线条更清晰、自然、上镜；平滑皮肤质感，减少瑕疵、暗沉和肤色不均，但不要过度磨皮，保留真实皮肤细节和自然光影。

请根据人物脸型设计一款匹配的商务发型。发型应干净利落、成熟专业、适合正式场合，发丝自然、有层次，不夸张。请为人物搭配正式商务穿搭，例如深色西装外套、白色或浅色衬衫，可搭配领带。整体造型应高级、简洁、专业、可信赖。

画面为正面半身肖像，人物居中，直视镜头，表情自然自信。背景为纯白色素色背景，光线柔和均匀，类似专业证件照、企业头像摄影或大学官网个人档案照。整体风格干净、正式、商务、高清写实摄影质感，方形比例 1:1。

画面下方预留简洁信息栏，并添加现代简洁排版文字：
姓名：[小泉柚奈]
身份/职位：[高级平面设计]
专业/部门/机构：[国际设计院]

重要文字规则：
如果用户输入的姓名、身份、职位、专业、部门、机构或其他需要显示在图片上的文字是中文或其他语言，请先将这些内容翻译成自然、准确、正式的英文，再放入图片中。除非用户明确要求保留中文，否则图片中不要显示中文文字。

排版要求：
第一行姓名使用深蓝色粗体大字号英文文字；第二行和第三行使用黑色常规字号英文文字。整体排版参考大学官网个人档案、学术会议人物介绍卡片或专业商务头像海报风格。
items.contentEnglish:
Open-source a money-making prompt, effects shown in Figure 1, with tons of TikTok accounts offering this kind of ID photo service. If this post gets enough heat, I'll open-source another hit 3:4 prompt, see Figure 2.
 Chinese Prompt:
Please generate a formal business profile headshot poster based on the portrait photo I uploaded. Retain the person's authentic identity features, facial proportions, face shape foundation, and overall temperament—do not alter the person's identity.
You can moderately optimize the facial contours to make the facial lines clearer, more natural, and camera-ready; smooth the skin texture, reduce blemishes, dullness, and uneven skin tone, but avoid over-smoothing—preserve authentic skin details and natural light and shadow.
Please design a matching business hairstyle based on the person's face shape. The hairstyle should be neat and tidy, mature and professional, suitable for formal occasions, with natural, layered strands that aren't exaggerated. Dress the person in formal business attire, such as a dark suit jacket and white or light-colored shirt, optionally with a tie. The overall look should be upscale, simple, professional, and trustworthy.
The image should be a front-facing half-body portrait, with the person centered and looking directly at the lens, expression naturally confident. Background is a pure white plain backdrop, with soft, even lighting, similar to professional ID photos, corporate headshots, or university official website personal profile photos. Overall style is clean, formal, business-like, high-definition realistic photography texture, square 1:1 ratio.
Reserve a simple info bar at the bottom of the image, and add modern, clean-layout text:
Name: [Yuna Koizumi]
Identity/Position: [Senior Graphic Designer]
Expertise/Department/Institution: [International Design Institute]
Important Text Rules:
If the user's input for name, identity, position, expertise, department, institution, or other text to be displayed on the image is in Chinese or another language, first translate this content into natural, accurate, formal English before placing it in the image. Unless the user explicitly requests to keep it in Chinese, do not display Chinese text in the image.
Layout Requirements:
First line (name) uses dark blue bold large font English text; second and third lines use black regular font size English text. Overall layout references university official website personal profiles, academic conference figure intro cards, or professional business headshot posters.

items.title: 彩色涂鸦小狗线条风格提示
items.summary: 提供“彩色涂鸦小狗线条风”绘图提示，强调随意、凌乱的非结构化绘制技巧。
items.contentChinese: 用一种色彩缤纷的涂鸦小狗线条风格来绘制这幅图，融入奇趣与涂鸦元素，务必使用一种完全无结构的绘画技法，乱糟糟、潦潦草草就行。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
「Draw this image in a colorful scribbled little dog line style, incorporating whimsy and doodle elements, be sure to use a completely unstructured drawing technique, messy and sloppy will do.』

items.title: GPT-4图像：8K温馨剪贴画改造
items.summary: 用GPT图像提示将参考图转为暖梦系剪贴簿风：保留人物与光影，添加多个迷你chibi并叠加手绘涂鸦。
items.contentChinese: 在8K电影级画质中，将参考图像转化为温馨的剪贴簿风格构图，严格保持主体、身份、姿势、光线和背景不变。添加多个同一个人的迷你Q版/玩偶版本（匹配脸部、发型、服装），自然摆放，进行各种不同的活动。在画面上叠加手绘涂鸦（爱心、箭头、星星、字幕/标注）。使用柔和的粉彩色调。画面要丰富但保持干净、温暖、梦幻、适合Instagram风格。最终效果必须增强同一张图像，而不是重新创作它
items.contentEnglish: In 8K Cinematic Transform the reference image into a cozy scrapbook-style composition, strictly preserving subject, identity, pose, lighting, and background. Add multiple mini chibi/doll versions of the same person (matching face, hair, outfit), placed naturally and doing varied activities. Overlay handwritten doodles (hearts, arrows, stars, captions). Use soft pastel tone. Keep it rich yet clean, warm, dreamy, Instagram-style. Final must enhance the SAME image, not recreate it

items.title: 健身迷你Q版同人风改图
items.summary: 在保持原照片人物身份真实不变的前提下，替换为健身穿搭并加入小Q版分身。搭配手绘涂鸦与激励文案，打造有冲劲的健身海报感。
items.contentChinese: 在保持原始照片完全不变的前提下编辑这张图像，包括人物的脸、身份和整体写实感，但将他的穿搭调整为时尚健身风格，例如紧身无袖背心或运动性能T恤，搭配运动短裤或锥形收腿慢跑裤，以及训练用运动鞋。将他置于自然的健身姿势中，例如举哑铃、手握杠铃、调整重量，或在组间休息时保持自信站姿，同时维持真实自然的身体姿态。保持光线和健身房背景一致且自然。让他周围出现多个小巧可爱的Q版迷你版本的他，拥有夸张的大头、富有表现力的表情，并保持相同的发型和健身服装。每个迷你角色都在进行不同的健身相关活动：其中一个双臂高举为他加油，一个穿着训练鞋在跑步，一个从摇摇杯里喝水，一个戴着运动型健身眼镜，还有一个俏皮地在他的腿旁攀爬。加入一些俏皮的手绘涂鸦和白色与蓝色墨水的手写便签，以剪贴簿风格贯穿整个画面，融入箭头、星星、闪电、火花以及随意的草图线条。添加健身主题的激励文字，用粗体手写风格，例如“lift heavy（举起更重）”“no excuses（不找借口）”“pain builds power（痛苦锻造力量）”“stay strong（保持坚强）”“one more rep（再来一组）”以及“train like a beast（像野兽一样训练）”。整体氛围要有趣、充满活力、阳刚且以健身为核心。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
"Edit this image while keeping the original photo exactly the same, including the person’s face, identity, and overall realism, but adjust his outfit to a stylish gym look such as a fitted sleeveless tank or performance t-shirt with athletic shorts or tapered joggers, along with training sneakers. Place him in a natural gyming pose such as lifting dumbbells, holding a barbell, adjusting weights, or resting between sets with a confident stance while maintaining a realistic posture. Keep the lighting and gym background consistent and natural. Surround him with multiple small, cute chibi-style mini versions of himself, featuring oversized heads, expressive faces, and the same hairstyle and gym outfit. Each mini character is performing different gym-related activities, including one cheering with arms raised, one running in training shoes, one drinking from a shaker bottle, one wearing sporty workout glasses, and one playfully climbing near his leg. Add playful hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and blue ink in a scrapbook style, incorporating arrows, stars, lightning bolts, sparkles, and sketchy lines throughout the image. Include gym-themed motivational text in a bold handwritten style such as "lift heavy", "no excuses", "pain builds power", "stay strong", "one more rep", and "train like a beast". Maintain an overall vibe that is fun, energetic, masculine, and fitness-focused."

items.title: GPT生成可爱手帐风头像
items.summary: 基于上传人像生成手帐风chibi贴纸合成，保留真实身份与氛围。
items.contentChinese:
就让自己来一场艺术般的宁静告白

趋势  
使用 GPT 2.0 创建的图像 于 @renoiseai

提示词  
小巧头像剪贴簿照片提示（基于已上传的女性人像）

使用上传的年轻女性图像作为基础。不要添加任何新人物。将现有主体改造成小巧头像（chibi）剪贴簿风格构图，同时需完整保留她的真实身份：面部、发型、发色（长而柔软的棕色头发）、自然妆容、黑色服装、姿势、光线以及舒适的室内氛围。

[主题检测]  
场景体现一种舒适的生活方式 / 自拍 / 工作区氛围：柔和的灯光、审美感的房间元素、一块带激励氛围的霓虹灯牌，以及一张笔记本桌面布置。全程保持平静、时尚、略带高效的生活状态情绪。

[小巧头像（Chibi）]  
添加 5–8 个与“同一个女孩”一致的小小 chibi 迷你版本：  
- 同样的长而柔软的棕色头发（轻微波浪）  
- 同样的穿搭色调（黑色上衣）  
- 同样温柔、自信的表情  

风格：  
- 可爱小巧头像贴纸风  
- 大头小身比例  
- 富有表现力的可爱大眼睛  
- 柔和的马卡龙色调阴影  
- 干净、高质量的贴纸成品

[小巧头像动作 – 不重复]  
- 拿着咖啡  
- 在笔记本电脑上工作  
- 拍自拍  
- 放松地侧靠姿势  
- 比出和平手势  
- 思考姿势  
- 舒展 / 放松慵懒姿势  
- 微笑并挥手

[贴纸摆放]  
- 只将小巧头像放在边缘与空白区域  
- 不要遮挡主脸或身体  
- 添加白色描边 + 柔和的投影  
- 轻微漂浮贴纸效果

[涂鸦]  
添加细腻的剪贴簿风格涂鸦：  
- 爱心、闪光、星星、箭头  
- 审美线条与圆形  
- 柔和发光点缀  

配色方案：  
白色 + 暖黄 + 柔粉（匹配霓虹氛围）

[手写文字]  
添加 5–8 句简短的审美短语：  
- “just me ”  
- “soft life”  
- “stay cozy”  
- “little moments”  
- “focus mode”  
- “good vibes only”  
- “create & grow”  
- “be you ”  

风格：  
- 手写字体  
- 白色文字带柔和光晕  
- 粉色/黄色的选择性高亮

[构图]  
- 中心焦点：真实女孩（不变）  
- 用小巧头像贴纸 + 涂鸦 + 文字围绕  
- 布局保持均衡、干净，不要杂乱

[风格关键词]  
真实照片 + 小巧头像贴纸、kawaii 可爱风、舒适生活方式、暖色光线、剪贴簿日记、柔和发光、高细节、Instagram 审美

[最终输出]  
一张精致、高质量、适合社交媒体发布的剪贴簿图片，包含：  
真实主体 + 可爱的小巧 chibi 扩展 + 审美涂鸦

[避免]  
- 改变面部身份  
- 过度变美或 AI 脸部畸变  
- 构图杂乱  
- 无关/随机元素  
- 遮挡主体
items.contentEnglish:
Just giving my self a art off peace with
Trend
Created image using GPT 2.0 Created on @renoiseai
Prompt
Chibi Avatar Scrapbook Photo Prompt (Based on Uploaded Female Portrait)
Use the uploaded image of a young woman as the base. Do NOT add any new person. Transform the existing subject into a chibi scrapbook-style composition while fully preserving her real identity, face, hairstyle, hair color (long soft brown hair), natural makeup, black outfit, pose, lighting, and cozy indoor aesthetic.
[Theme Detection]
The scene reflects a cozy lifestyle / selfie / workspace vibe with soft lighting, aesthetic room elements, a motivational neon sign, and a laptop desk setup. Maintain a calm, stylish, slightly productive lifestyle mood throughout.
[Chibi Avatars]

- same long soft brown hair (slight waves)
- same outfit tone (black top)
- same gentle, confident expression
Style:
- kawaii chibi sticker style
- big head, small body proportions
- expressive cute eyes
- soft pastel shading
- clean, high-quality sticker finish
[Chibi Actions – no repetition]
- holding coffee
- working on laptop
- taking selfie
- relaxed leaning pose
- peace sign
- thinking pose
- stretching / chill pose
- smiling & waving
[Sticker Placement]
- Place chibi avatars around edges and empty areas only
- Do NOT cover the main face or body
- Add white outline + soft drop shadow
- Slight floating sticker effect
[Doodles]
Add subtle scrapbook-style doodles:
- hearts, sparkles, stars, arrows
- aesthetic lines and circles
- soft glowing accents
Color palette:
white + warm yellow + soft pink (matching neon vibe)
[Handwritten Text]
Add 5–8 short aesthetic phrases:
- "just me "
- "soft life"
- "stay cozy"
- "little moments"
- "focus mode"
- "good vibes only"
- "create & grow"
- "be you "

[Style Keywords]
realistic photo + chibi stickers, kawaii aesthetic, cozy lifestyle, warm lighting, scrapbook diary, soft glow, high detail, Instagram aesthetic
[Final Output]
A polished, high-quality, social-media-ready scrapbook image combining:
realistic subject + cute chibi extensions + aesthetic doodles

- altering facial identity
- over-beautifying or AI face distortion

- unrelated/random elements

items.title: 白绢没骨写意人物绘制解析
items.summary: 融合高马得减笔、关良戏曲与林风眠淡彩的没骨写意人物水墨技法。强调连续湿墨成形与大面积留白点景。
items.contentChinese: 【主题 / 角色】，白绢本原作感的当代没骨写意人物水墨，融合高马得式减笔人物、关良式戏曲人物写意、林风眠式淡彩仕女与没骨大写意人物语言，白绢载体，绢面洁白微暖，带细密丝缕纹理与轻微绢丝光泽，墨色与淡彩沉入绢理之中，湿墨晕染、渗化、浸润，人物从墨气中显形，以浓墨、焦墨、宿墨、积墨建立主墨形，墨色沉厚油润，几笔成形，墨块塑形，书法性拖笔，服饰主形不超过三笔，一整条连续墨势贯穿全身，衣袖、裙摆、长发由整段连续湿墨一气带出，笔断意不断、形不断、墨路不断，除面部五官轻提神外其余一律不描边，不做碎片化水墨、不做断续飞白、不做线稿式古风立绘，整体安静、简逸、空灵、疏朗、柔润、低对比，大面积白绢留白，仅少量竹叶 / 梅枝 / 小鸟 / 印章点景，画面角落自然加入手写签名“
items.contentEnglish: 【Theme / Role】, contemporary ink-and-wash figures in a boneless freehand style with the feel of the original work on white silk, combining Gao Ma De–style simplified figure drawing, Guan Liang–style operatic figure suggestive painting, Lin Fengmian–style pale-color ladies and boneless large freehand figure language. On a white-silk support: the silk is clean and faintly warm, with delicate thread-like textures and a slight silk sheen. The ink tones and pale colors sink into the silk fibers; wet ink blurs, permeates, and soaks in. The figures emerge from the ink atmosphere. Use heavy ink, scorched ink, aged ink, and accumulated ink to establish the primary ink form. The ink is dense, rich, and glossy; form is created in a few strokes. Ink blocks shape the body; calligraphic dragging strokes. The main figure of the clothing must not exceed three strokes. A single continuous ink flow runs through the entire body. Sleeves, skirt hems, and long hair are drawn out from one continuous segment of wet ink. The brush may pause, but the intent does not; the form does not; the ink path does not. Except for lightly emphasizing the facial features, everything else is not outlined. No fragmented ink-and-wash, no discontinuous flying-white strokes, no line-drawing–style ancient-fantasy character illustration. Overall: quiet, simple, ethereal, sparse, soft, low contrast. Large areas of white-silk 留白 (negative space) are left, with only a small amount of bamboo leaves / plum branches / small birds / seals as point accents. Naturally add a handwritten signature “

items.title: 巴黎巨人感超写实电影镜头
items.summary: 超现实巨型女性以“上传脸”参考站在埃菲尔铁塔旁，低机位8K广角呈现电影级光影与细节。
items.contentChinese:
一张电影感、超真实的8K宽幅广角镜头，从戏剧性的低机位拍摄，使用超广角镜头，描绘一个超现实的瞬间：一位身躯巨大的巨人女性，采用上传的人脸作为100%参考，站在巴黎的埃菲尔铁塔旁。巨大的女性形体微微前倾，她那巨大的手掌轻轻握住铁塔的上部，就像在调整一件精致的金属雕塑一样，微妙地弯曲其结构而不将其折断。  
她穿着时尚合身的黑色短袖T恤、高腰修身的蓝色牛仔裤以及灰色帆布运动鞋，左手腕戴着皮质表带的手表，脸上戴着优雅的眼镜。她那长而蓬松的头发随风自然流动，为画面增添动感与真实感，而她的表情依然平静、坚定、自信且专注。  
周围的城市景观无尽延展——经典的巴黎建筑、狭窄的街道，以及在远处低空中缓慢移动的微型汽车——进一步强调了巨大的尺度对比。天空中布满戏剧性的暴风云，为整个场景投下柔和、昏暗的情绪化光照，铁塔的铁质格架上反射出柔软的高光。  
画面中可见超细节纹理——从逼真的皮肤细节和衣物褶皱到精密的金属结构——并由大气景深、轻雾以及远处的霾气增强，形成一种超现实却令人信服的电影级构图。  
纵横比：2:3
items.contentEnglish:
A cinematic, hyper-realistic 8K wide shot captured from a dramatic low angle with an ultra-wide lens, depicting a surreal moment where a colossal giant woman with the uploaded face as a 100% reference stands beside the Eiffel Tower in Paris. The giant female figure leans slightly forward, her massive hand gently gripping the upper section of the tower as if adjusting a delicate metal sculpture, subtly bending its structure without breaking it.
She is dressed in a stylish fitted black t-shirt, high-waisted slim blue jeans, and grey canvas sneakers, wearing a leather-strap watch on her left wrist and elegant glasses on her face. Her long, voluminous hair flows naturally with the wind, adding motion and realism, while her expression remains calm, confident, and focused.
The surrounding cityscape stretches endlessly with classic Parisian buildings, narrow streets, and tiny moving cars far below, emphasizing the immense scale contrast. The sky is filled with dramatic storm clouds, casting diffused, moody lighting across the entire scene, with soft highlights reflecting off the iron lattice of the tower.
Ultra-detailed textures are visible throughout — from realistic skin details and fabric folds to the intricate metal structure — enhanced by atmospheric depth, light fog, and distant haze, creating a surreal yet believable cinematic composition.
Aspect Ratio: 2:3

Naughty Tom got caught and Jerry enjoying

items.contentChinese: 一组散落的冲印照片快照，摆放在一张木桌上，展示了一系列虚构的成年东亚女性在夜晚的酒店房间里独自一人的抓拍瞬间。逼真摄影、日式负片胶片质感、色调压低、对比度较低、略带偏绿的色调、柔和的高光晕染、可见的胶片颗粒、机位直闪。主体：成年东亚女性，短黑发，自然美感，神情平静且略显疏离，带有微妙的性感吸引力，不与任何真实人物相似。服装：性感地解开纽扣的白色衬衫，露出一点点胸部线条与精致蕾丝内衣，黑色迷你短裙，裙摆略微向上滑至大腿，随意慵懒的造型，衣料呈现自然褶皱，以一种得体却诱人的方式稍显凌乱。场景：小型酒店房间，带有图案床单的床、床头台灯、窗帘部分拉上，透过窗户可隐约见到夜色城市灯光。捕捉的瞬间：* 以放松又带诱惑的姿势躺在床上，身体微微拱起，一条膝盖礼貌性地弯起，暗示性地伸出 * 坐在床上向下看，双腿优雅交叠以突出她的曲线，背部微微拱起 * 靠在床头板上，双臂抬到头顶上方，背部性感地拱起，衬衫在胸口处被拉开 * 在桌边吃简单的食物，慢慢把一口食物送到嘴唇，动作带着一丝感性的触感 * 从玻璃杯中饮水，头微微后仰，嘴唇以性感的姿态贴在杯沿 * 身体从肩后转回，衬衫从两侧滑落到肩上，回头以神秘而遥远的目光凝视。构图：每一张都是抓拍快照，不完美的取景、略微偏角度，自然且未经摆拍。灯光：强烈的直闪与昏暗的环境钨丝灯光结合，形成强对比与一次性胶片相机般的怀旧观感。排列：多张冲印照片随机散落在木质表面，彼此略微重叠，构成叙事拼贴。氛围：安静、亲密、略显孤寂，深夜独处；日常写实与微妙性感并存，未露骨。4K，超高细节，逼真摄影，无文字，无水印。
items.contentEnglish: A collection of scattered printed photo snapshots placed on a wooden table, showing a series of candid moments of a fictional adult East Asian woman alone in a hotel room at night. Photorealistic, Japanese negative film aesthetic, muted tones, low contrast, subtle greenish tint, soft highlight bloom, visible film grain, direct on-camera flash. Subject: adult East Asian woman, short black hair, natural beauty, calm and slightly distant expression with subtle sensual allure, no resemblance to any real person. Outfit: seductively unbuttoned white shirt revealing a hint of cleavage and delicate lace bra, black mini skirt riding slightly up her thighs, relaxed styling with natural wrinkles in fabric, subtly disheveled in a tasteful yet alluring way. Scene: small hotel room, bed with patterned sheets, bedside lamp, curtains partially closed, night city lights faintly visible through window. Moments captured: * lying on bed in a relaxed seductive pose, body slightly arched with one knee bent invitingly * sitting on bed looking down, legs elegantly crossed to accentuate her curves, subtle arch in her back * leaning back against the headboard with arms raised above her head, back sensually arched, shirt pulling open at the chest * eating simple food at a table, slowly bringing a bite to her lips with a sensual touch * drinking from a glass, head tilted back slightly, lips sensually pressed against the rim * turning back over her shoulder with shirt slipping off both shoulders, looking back with a mysterious distant gaze Composition: each image is a candid snapshot, imperfect framing, slightly off-angle, natural and unposed feeling. Lighting: harsh direct flash combined with dim ambient tungsten light, creating strong contrast and a nostalgic disposable camera look. Arrangement: multiple printed photos randomly scattered on a wooden surface, overlapping slightly, creating a narrative collage. Mood: quiet, intimate, slightly lonely, late-night solitude, everyday realism, subtle sensuality without explicit exposure. 4K, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, no text, no watermark.

items.title: Renoise配套GPT图2海报提示词
items.summary: 提供A4宣传风海报提示词，强调双重曝光与叙事拼贴的强视觉层次。
items.contentChinese:
Renoise 中的 GPT 图像 2  
使用此提示词  
创建一张高质量的宣传海报，A4 版面，画面中包含上传的角色。上半部分：角色的头部、面部特征、面具或半身剪影应作为主要、标志性的视觉元素。中部至下半部分：以稳定或略带动态的站立姿势呈现角色的全身，形成画面的中心焦点。围绕剪影应用双重曝光与叙事拼贴技术，整合分层场景、额外图像、小角色互动、辅助元素和环境背景，并用云雾、墨迹与充足的白色留白进行编排。将辅助元素放置在左右两侧，以制造视觉张力与深度。加入一条纵向流动的线条，将顶部剪影、内部拼贴元素与全身角色连接起来，以统一构图。保持大量留白，边缘使用墨迹扩散、柔和模糊和视觉碎片化来实现富有诗意、具有“呼吸感”的审美。使用鲜艳的流行色彩，同时确保整体风格一致、精致、讲究品质，突出视觉分层、叙事性与强烈的关键视觉冲击力。
items.contentEnglish:
GPT image 2 on Renoise
Use this prompt
Create a high-quality propaganda-style poster in A4 format featuring the uploaded character. Top half: the character's head, facial features, mask, or half-body silhouette should serve as the primary, iconic visual element. Middle to bottom: display the full-length character in a stable or slightly dynamic standing pose, forming the central focus. Apply double exposure and narrative collage techniques around the silhouette, integrating layered scenes, additional images, small character interactions, supporting elements, and environmental backgrounds, arranged with clouds, ink, and abundant white negative space. Place supporting elements on the left and right to create visual tension and depth. Include a vertical flowing line connecting the top silhouette, internal collage elements, and full-body character to unify the composition. Maintain extensive negative space, with edges featuring ink diffusion, soft blur, and visual fragmentation to achieve a poetic, ‘breathing’ aesthetic. Use vibrant pop colors while ensuring the overall style is consistent, refined, premium, and emphasizes visual layering, narrative, and strong key visual impact.

items.title: 用 ChatGPT-Image2 做3D历史立像
items.summary: 用ChatGPT-Image2生成3D历史人物立像档案，把一生高光浓缩成可阅读的视觉作品。
items.content:
《3D历史人物立像档案》简版提示词：

请创作一张高完成度的「历史人物破框立像档案 / 3D Historical Breakout Biography Poster」。

【用户输入】
主题人物：【人物姓名】
人物身份定位：【帝王 / 名将 / 名臣 / 思想家 / 文学家 / 改革家 / 军事家等】
时代背景：【朝代 / 历史时期】
核心关键词：【统一 / 变法 / 忠义 / 知行合一 / 北伐 / 制度 / 心学 / 盛世等】
人物主色倾向：【玄黑金红 / 青蓝灰金 / 暗红墨金 / 铁甲深蓝等】
画幅比例：【3:4 竖版】

这不是普通历史海报，而是一张以「中央全身3D历史人物 + 破框前冲动作 + 四周轻质悬浮历史事件簇 + 底部轻量年谱时间轴」为核心结构的高完成度历史人物纪传海报。

画面中央必须是一位完整全身、站立姿态的3D历史人物，人物是整张图最重要的主视觉，具有强体积感、雕塑感、纪念碑感和历史气场。服饰、冠帽、甲胄、纹样、腰带、鞋履、配饰都要符合其时代身份，整体要写实、厚重、有电影级冲击力。人物脚下要有一个轻而稳的纪念碑式台基，负责承托人物，但不能厚重压画面。

人物不能只是普通站立，必须有一个明显的“前冲破框动作”。手部、手臂或所持关键道具（如玉玺、诏书、卷轴、长枪、长剑、兵符、笏板、地图、书卷等）必须朝向观者伸出，形成强烈的近大远小、前后纵深、透视压缩和破出画面的3D冲击。特别注意：前冲出来的关键道具必须完整可见、清晰可辨识，不能被画面裁切到只剩一小截。

围绕人物四周布置 6 到 10 个关键历史节点。不要做成厚重、规整、整齐平铺的小卡片，而要做成“轻质悬浮、多朝向、半透明”的历史事件簇。每个节点可由 2 到 4 个子碎片组成，包括编号、年份、事件标题、简短说明、小型历史场景画面，以及细金线、开放式边框、节点圆点、注释线等。整体感觉应该像历史档案被拆解成轻盈的时间切片，在人物四周悬浮展开，而不是普通信息卡片排版。

这些事件簇要有不同朝向和空间透视关系：有的左倾，有的右倾，有的向内转，有的向外翻，有的高一些，有的低一些，有前后层次，也可以被人物手臂、衣摆、武器轻微遮挡，形成空间纵深。它们应具有玻璃感、亚克力感、微发光边缘、不完整边框和轻度错位叠层，信息详细但视觉上轻，不可压过中央人物。

画面左侧设置大标题【人物姓名】，使用具有东方历史气质的书法感、碑刻感或墨迹感字体。旁边可加入生卒年、身份标签、关键词总结和一句高度概括性的副标题。标题区要稳、简、克制，不要堆满。

底部必须设置一条轻盈、简洁、细致的横向时间轴，串联人物一生的重要年份，并与四周历史事件簇形成对应关系。时间轴更像策展导览线、博物馆时间标尺或历史索引线，可使用细金线、小圆点、简洁年份、小型文字标注和少量装饰节点。不要做成厚重黑色横栏或巨大底部信息块。

背景以米白宣纸、古纸、旧档案纸或浅色博物馆墙面为基础，整体低饱和、干净、克制。可加入淡淡地图纹理、古建筑剪影、文献残片、印章、金色连接线、注释线、节点、疆域轮廓等元素，营造轻盈理性的历史档案展陈感。

整张图必须建立明确对比：
中央人物厚重、真实、立体、强光影、强体积；
四周历史节点轻薄、透明、悬浮、微发光、精致理性；
人物动作前冲、破框，具有空间爆发力；
底部时间轴轻盈克制，只负责收束信息。

如果不同要求冲突，请优先保证：
1. 中央人物完整全身
2. 前冲道具完整可见且有强烈3D冲击
3. 四周事件簇轻盈悬浮、不是厚重卡片
4. 中央人物“重”，信息系统“轻”
5. 底部时间轴轻量化、清晰、不压画面

如果模型难以精确控制大量小字，请优先保证人物姓名、年份、编号、事件标题清晰，小段说明可适度简化或预留后期排版空间。

items.title: GPT图像2：赛博霓虹雨夜日漫
items.summary: 提供一段用于生成高端日漫电影质感的雨夜东京赛博风提示词，包含光影、材质与镜头参数。
items.contentChinese:
ChatGPT 的第 2 张 GPT 图像  
提示词  
创建一幅超高细节的电影级动漫插画，风格类似于高预算的现代日本动漫电影。一个美丽的年轻女性站在夜晚的雨夜霓虹东京街头，穿着一件宽大的黑色连帽衫，带有细微发光的蓝色图案，搭配宽松的工装裤，以及时尚的运动鞋。她那长长的湿发在风中自然飘动，脸部和衣物上带有带反光效果的霓虹高光。  
氛围带有情感、神秘与未来感。用全息广告牌环绕周围环境，加入发光的店铺招牌、虚化的交通信号灯、街道上的雨水倒影、飘散的薄雾，以及柔和的体积光照明。添加动感的动漫风格运动模糊、强烈的戏剧化透视、逼真的雨滴物理效果，以及高度富有表现力的电影感眼睛。  
配色方案：霓虹蓝、紫色、粉色、青色，以及柔和的白色光晕。  
风格灵感来源于：新海诚 + 气质赛博朋克动漫美学 + 顶级动漫电影品质。  
相机角度：低机位电影镜头，浅景深，前景/背景分离强烈。  
超锐细节、动漫写实、富有情感叙事构图、8K 画质、杰作级动漫艺术作品，无文字，无水印。
items.contentEnglish:
GPT image 2 on ChatGPT
Prompt
Create an ultra-detailed cinematic anime illustration in the style of a high-budget modern Japanese anime film. A beautiful young woman stands on a rainy neon-lit Tokyo street at night, wearing an oversized black hoodie with subtle glowing blue patterns, loose cargo pants, and stylish sneakers. Her long wet hair flows naturally in the wind, with reflective neon highlights on her face and clothes.
The atmosphere feels emotional, mysterious, and futuristic. Surround the environment with holographic billboards, glowing shop signs, blurred traffic lights, rainy reflections on the street, drifting fog, and soft volumetric lighting. Add dynamic anime-style motion blur, dramatic perspective, realistic rain physics, and highly expressive cinematic eyes.
Color palette: neon blue, purple, pink, cyan, and soft white glow.
Style inspired by Makoto Shinkai + Cyberpunk anime aesthetics + premium anime movie quality.
Camera angle: low-angle cinematic shot with shallow depth of field and strong foreground/background separation.
Ultra-sharp details, anime realism, emotional storytelling composition, 8K quality, masterpiece anime artwork, no text, no watermark.

items.title: GPT打造现代中古卧室情绪板
items.summary: 用GPT Image 2 生成竖版3:4高端卧室情绪板，含材质软装样本与配色图例。基于照片匹配风格氛围，输出可直接用于图像生成。
items.contentChinese:
室内设计情绪板生成器
提示词：
（室内设计情绪板生成器 / Interior Design Mood Board Generator）
你是一名专业的室内设计 Mood Board 创作者。请基于用户提供的 [Space Type] 室内设计照片，生成一张 竖版 3:4 的高端室内设计情绪板。整体视觉参考专业室内设计提案图，呈现 [Style Keywords] 的审美特征，画面应具备 [Mood Keywords] 的空间氛围，并符合 [Branding Tone] 的高级设计表达。
场景类型（Space Type）：[Space Type]
画面布局要求
上半部分：呈现一张高分辨率、照片级真实感的 [Space Type] 室内设计效果图。
该效果图需要在空间结构、家具语言、材质关系、色彩搭配、光影氛围上与用户输入照片保持一致，同时提升为更完整、更精致、更具设计提案感的视觉呈现。
重点体现：[Key Furniture Elements]、[Material Keywords]、[Color Palette]、[Lighting Style]。
下半部分：展示与上方空间设计严格对应的材质与软装样本，包括：
材料样板
面料样本
色卡
饰面样本
与该空间相关的木材、石材、金属、玻璃、织物、皮革或涂料样本
所有样本必须与上方空间保持一致，并准确反映该设计方案中的核心材质与色彩逻辑。
右下角：设置一个 Design Legend / Color Palette 信息框，统一展示本方案的：
主色
辅助色
点缀色
核心材质
饰面说明
风格关键词
风格与输出要求
专业室内设计公司级别的 Mood Board 版式
极简、整洁、克制、有秩序的排版
明确的视觉层级与留白控制
材质、色彩、面料、饰面与上方空间完全匹配
标签清晰、现代、简洁，具有高级编辑设计感
整体气质需符合 [Style Keywords]
呈现 [Render Quality]
竖版 3:4 构图
4K Ultra HD
超高细节
写实渲染
直接用于图像生成
标签要求
每个材质或色彩样本配有清晰标签，标签内容围绕以下信息组织：
[Label Language] 的材质名称、颜色名称、饰面名称或织物类型。
标签风格应简洁、专业、排版规整，不喧宾夺主。
主题定义
[Space Type] Interior Design Mood Board
风格方向：[Style Name]
关键词：[Style Keywords], [Material Keywords], [Color Palette], [Mood Keywords]
负面约束
避免杂乱拼贴、避免廉价海报风、避免材质与空间不匹配、避免错误透视、避免低质字体、避免装饰元素过多、避免卡通感、避免过饱和色彩、避免信息层级混乱、避免伪随机材质堆砌。
空间类型：卧室
风格名称：现代中古
变量当成可替换字段：
[Space Type]：空间类型
例如：客厅、卧室、餐厅、厨房、书房、玄关、浴室、会客区、酒店大堂
[Style Name]：风格名称
例如：现代极简、意式极简、侘寂、奶油风、轻法式、现代中古、北欧自然、深色豪宅、日式原木、当代奢雅
[Style Keywords]：风格关键词
例如：modern minimalist, clean lines, refined luxury, warm contemporary
[Mood Keywords]：氛围关键词
例如：温暖宁静、克制高级、通透自然、沉稳静奢、明亮柔和
[Branding Tone]：品牌化视觉语气
例如：高端设计事务所提案感、国际家居品牌视觉、编辑型画册审美、奢华但克制
[Key Furniture Elements]：重点家具/造型元素
例如：低矮沙发、弧形单椅、岩板茶几、悬浮电视柜、落地灯、艺术摆件
[Material Keywords]：关键材质
例如：白蜡木、胡桃木、洞石、亚麻、羊毛、拉丝金属、微水泥、皮革、玻璃
[Color Palette]：配色方案
例如：米白、暖灰、燕麦色、焦糖棕、炭灰、鼠尾草绿、黑胡桃色
[Lighting Style]：光线风格
例如：自然漫射光、晨间柔光、傍晚暖光、均匀展厅光、低照度氛围光
[Label Language]：标签语言
例如：英文、中英双语、纯中文
[Render Quality]：渲染质量描述
例如：照片级真实感、high-end editorial rendering、luxury interior visualization

items.contentEnglish:
GPT Image 2 on chatgpt
Prompt: A 90s disposable-camera style flash snapshot taken inside a small, bustling Japanese izakaya decorated with handwritten menus and retro posters. Direct flash creates grain, harsh shadows, and bright highlights. A young woman sits on a wooden bar stool, turning her upper body back toward the camera. items.title: 东京街拍意外感时尚编辑风
items.summary: 保留人物特征，打造东京夜巷中被猫打断的混乱时尚街拍。
items.contentChinese:
GPT IMAGE 2 在 ChatGPT 上
提示：
使用上传的图像作为主体基础。严格保留主体原始的面部特征、身份、发型、身体比例、皮肤纹理以及参考图像中可辨识的特征。保持准确的相貌还原和自然的脸部结构。忽略原始服装和背景中无关的部分，同时保留同样自发的日本街拍能量。
将图像转化为一张混乱的时尚编辑摄影作品，仿佛在东京巷弄的夜晚一次意外的喜剧性打断中拍摄。
主体穿着高度造型化的当代日本街头风编辑时装：超大号摩托越野球衣、叠穿的档案感时尚配饰、垂挂链条、做旧宽松牛仔裤、从腰间垂下的有线耳机、金属硬件细节、戒指、叠戴项链、轻微的颓废风造型。整体穿搭应呈现真实的高时尚街头编辑感，而不是角色扮演。
主体的身体姿势保持高度风格化与编辑感，充满态度与有意的时尚摆姿，姿态优雅、轮廓动态。然而这一刻却变得尴尬且不经意地滑稽。主体在摆姿中途突然被闯入画面的猫打断而分神。
主体绝对不能正面对镜头。身体朝向背离相机方向，只有头部回转并越肩看回去。表情应为震惊、困惑、尴尬地被打断，嘴微微张开，眼神自然反应。时尚编辑式的肢体语言与抓拍式的不适感相结合。
一只蓬松的橘白猫在画面前景、极其靠近镜头的一侧猛烈抢镜。猫和主体在视觉上像是在无意中忽略对方或互相抵消，构图上几乎呈背对背关系。猫背对主体，而主体只把头转向这次骚动。由于超近镜头透视，猫看起来夸张放大，部分失焦，混乱而偶发。
摄影角度为戏剧性的低机位手持拍摄，带有强烈的荷兰式倾斜和歪斜构图。透视不稳定且自发，仿佛摄影师也被吓了一跳。构图不完美、裁切平衡尴尬、意外的取景失误、不对称的视觉重量、部分遮挡。
视觉运动特征：
轻微运动模糊
对焦失误
前景模糊
手持不稳定
意外的构图柔化
不完美的焦平面
由移动造成的轻微方向性拖影
使用复古 2000 年代初 CCD 数码相机美学，结合现代时尚编辑能量拍摄。24mm 等效广角镜头，带有夸张的透视畸变。东京夜晚的小巷，远处背景中可见发光的东京塔、电线杆、狭窄住宅道路，仅使用实际街灯照明。
视觉调色：
带绿色偏色的 CCD 白平衡
脏青绿色阴影
温暖的橙色塔灯辉光
低对比度
乳白色黑位
高光泛光
高 ISO 颗粒
反精致美学
原始狗仔抓拍能量
怀旧的日本夏夜氛围
情绪上疏离的都市气息
避免精致奢华的时尚摄影。避免干净对称的构图。避免与镜头直接对视。避免电影般的完美。图像应像一张昂贵的时尚大片，却以最美丽的意外方式被毁掉。长宽比 9:16
items.contentEnglish:
GPT IMAGE 2 on ChatGPT
Prompt:
Use uploaded image as the main subject foundation. STRICTLY preserve the subject’s original facial features, identity, hairstyle, body proportions, skin texture, and recognizable traits from the reference image. Maintain accurate likeness preservation and natural facial structure. Ignore unrelated original clothing and background while preserving the same spontaneous Japanese street snapshot energy.
Transform the image into a chaotic fashion editorial photograph captured during an accidental comedic interruption in a Tokyo alley at night.
The subject wears heavily styled contemporary Japanese streetwear editorial fashion: oversized motocross jersey, layered archive-fashion accessories, hanging chains, distressed baggy denim, wired headphones hanging from waist, metallic hardware details, rings, layered necklaces, subtle grunge styling. Wardrobe should feel authentic high-fashion streetwear editorial instead of cosplay.
The subject’s body pose remains highly stylized and editorial, full of attitude and intentional fashion posing, with elegant posture and dynamic silhouette. However the moment itself becomes awkward and unintentionally comedic. The subject is suddenly distracted mid-pose by the cat photobombing the shot.
The subject must NOT face directly toward the camera. Body facing away from camera direction while only the head turns back over the shoulder. Expression is shocked, confused, awkwardly interrupted, mouth slightly open, eyes reacting naturally. Fashion-editorial body language mixed with candid uncomfortable energy.
A fluffy orange-white cat aggressively photobombs the foreground extremely close to the lens on the opposite side of the frame. The cat and subject visually feel like they are unintentionally ignoring or counterbalancing each other, almost back-to-back compositionally. The cat faces away from the subject while the subject turns only her head toward the disturbance. The cat should appear oversized due to ultra-close lens perspective, partially out of focus, chaotic and accidental.
Camera angle is dramatic low-angle handheld with aggressive dutch tilt and canted framing. Perspective feels unstable and spontaneous as if the photographer also became startled. Imperfect composition, awkward crop balance, accidental framing mistakes, asymmetrical visual weight, partial obstruction.
Visual motion characteristics:
slight motion blur
missed autofocus
foreground blur
handheld instability
accidental framing softness
imperfect focus plane
subtle directional smear from movement
Shot using vintage early-2000s CCD digicam aesthetic mixed with modern fashion editorial energy. Wide 24mm equivalent lens with exaggerated perspective distortion. Tokyo alley at night with glowing Tokyo Tower in background distance, utility poles, narrow residential road, practical streetlights only.
Visual grading:
green-tinted CCD white balance
dirty cyan-green shadows
warm orange tower glow
low contrast
milky blacks
highlight bloom
high ISO grain
anti-clean aesthetic
raw paparazzi snapshot energy
nostalgic Japanese summer night mood
emotionally detached urban atmosphere
Avoid polished luxury fashion photography. Avoid clean symmetrical composition. Avoid direct eye contact with camera. Avoid cinematic perfection. The image should feel like an expensive fashion editorial ruined in the most beautiful accidental way possible. aspect ratio 9:16

items.title: 流萤旅馆睡相抓拍
items.summary: 凌晨两点的星穹铁道旅馆快照，疲惫睡着的流萤真人化瞬间。
items.contentChinese:
指定角色：流萤
角色所属世界观：崩壞：星穹鐵道

真实社交平台风格手机快照，凌晨两点。画面主体是 {指定角色} 的真人化版本，一位明确成年的女性角色，不像任何真实明星、网红或名人。她必须保留该角色最核心的可识别特征：发型、发色、脸部气质、代表性色彩、标志性饰品、常用服装元素或身份符号，但整体转译为真实旅行生活中的自然状态。

场景是符合 {指定角色} 所属世界观的旅馆、客房、临时住所或休息舱，而不是默认现代商务酒店。请根据角色原作世界观、时代背景、所属阵营、常驻地区和视觉美术风格自动推导房间环境：如果角色来自海贼或航海世界，房间应像海岛旅馆、船舱客房或港口旅店；如果角色来自魔法世界，房间应有木质旅馆、烛灯、羊皮纸、魔法道具；如果角色来自赛博科幻世界，房间应有合金墙面、霓虹窗光、电子设备、舱室床铺；如果角色来自古风或幻想世界，房间应有屏风、木榻、纱帐、灯笼、传统器物。环境必须明显服务于 {指定角色} 的世界观，而不是普通现代酒店房间。

她在旅行、任务、宴会、战斗或长途移动后疲惫到直接倒在床上睡着，被同行朋友站在床边用手机随手拍下。画面不是写真，不是摆拍，不是广告大片，而是朋友觉得她平时形象强烈、现在睡相反差太大而留下的轻松记录照，真实、自然、有社交平台随手发图感。

她拥有精致韩系脸和高级感五官，大而清透的眼睛，细腻柔和的鼻唇线条，白皙透亮的高级柔光奶油肌，皮肤带轻微高光、自然肌理。
items.contentEnglish:
她的身形为成熟丰腴但协调自然的曲线型体态，肩颈线柔和舒展，腰线清晰，腰胯转折自然，腿部比例修长，整体呈现优雅的 S 型轮廓。

人物处于睡熟状态，头发凌乱散开，几缕发丝贴在脸颊、额头或唇边，嘴巴微微张开或表情完全放松，眼睛闭合，睡姿自然随机。她穿着隨機恥力爆表的符合角色世界观的睡衣套装，睡衣扣子全解開，裤子为短款睡裤。颜色和细节参考 {指定角色} 的代表性色彩与服装元素；衣料有自然皱褶和睡乱后的松散感，身体被被子、枕头、披风、外袍或毯子自然遮挡。整体是疲惫、反差、生活化的睡相，而不是性感摆拍。

PBR皮肤质感，真实微汗肌肤，锁骨、肩膀、腹部、腰线和大腿有细小汗珠与冷光高光，强景深分层、边缘光、暗角。微弱暖白灯光从左前上方照射，右侧冰冷轮廓光勾勒发丝、肩颈、手部。

床上可见凌乱枕头、半掀开的被子、皱起的床单，以及符合 {指定角色} 世界观的旅行用品和随身物件。床头或桌面上摆放与角色设定相关的小物：可以是水杯、地图、书卷、航海用品、魔法道具、武器护具、饰品、徽章、通行证、香水瓶、发饰、食物包装、任务文件或阵营标记。所有道具都要贴合角色世界观和身份。

房间背景必须根据 {指定角色} 的世界观变化。墙面、床头、窗帘、灯具、地板、行李、窗外光线和装饰物都应体现角色所处世界的材质与审美：木板、船舱、海风、藤编、金属舱室、霓虹、魔法烛灯、古典屏风、石墙、帐篷、旅店木梁、徽章纹样、阵营标志或地方文化元素。背景要有生活杂乱感，但不能脏乱恶心；要像真实住了一晚的旅途房间。

手机直闪拍摄，混合房间内微弱环境光。部分床单、枕头和皮肤边缘有轻微过曝，背景较暗。画面具有手机 HDR、社交平台压缩感、轻微手震模糊、自然噪点、弱光环境下的生活抓拍质感。

朋友站在床边略高角度拍摄，24mm 手机广角，9:16 竖式构图，相机微微倾斜。人物全身勉强入镜，头顶、手臂或脚尖可以略微被裁切，构图有一点随手感。画面重点是 {指定角色} 真人化后的疲惫睡相、角色标志性特征、符合世界观的旅馆环境、凌乱床铺和朋友视角的真实记录感，而不是刻意展示身体。

items.title: Seedance 2.0古风FPV镜头逻辑
items.summary: 补充镜头运动逻辑，打造一镜到底的沉浸式古风游戏第一人称视频。
items.content:
、完整提示词由GPT根据镜头轨迹生成：
使用上传图片作为首帧、场景参考和五位角色外观参考，生成一段 16:9、15 秒、一镜到底的沉浸式古风游戏第一人称 FPV 视频。

红色箭头仅作为镜头移动路线，不在最终成片中显示。玩家按照以下路线依次与五位角色互动：

右前景紫衣坐姿角色“清扬” → 左前景青衣坐姿角色“静姝” → 中央粉衣站姿角色“令仪” → 右中景蓝衣倚栏角色“杜若” → 左后景粉衣回眸角色“采薇”。

整体为游戏第一人称视角，玩家穿着深青色古风窄袖，右手偶尔进入画面，每次靠近角色时都轻轻抬手做出打招呼的动作。镜头具有真实步行产生的轻微起伏、自然呼吸感和明显前后景视差，不要像无人机飞行，不要瞬移，不要硬切镜头。

场景保持苏式园林凉亭、水塘、古典建筑、暖色阳光、轻柔帷幔、水面反光和华丽仙侠服装。角色保持原有位置、服装颜色与人物身份，不要换脸，不要改变人数，不要增加额外人物。

0.00–0.70 秒：
玩家从凉亭右侧进入，水塘泛起波纹，帷幔轻轻飘动，出现极简游戏准星和淡红金色导航光迹。

0.70–2.30 秒：
玩家靠近右前景紫衣角色“清扬”，抬手打招呼。清扬抬眸微笑，指尖从下颌旁轻轻放下，回应：“少侠，可愿听我一曲？”角色旁出现水墨金边信息卡：清扬，擅长：歌。

2.30–4.20 秒：
玩家向左前方移动，靠近青衣坐姿角色“静姝”。静姝缓缓放低团扇，轻轻侧头，回应：“正好，陪我落一子。”角色旁出现信息卡：静姝，擅长：棋。

4.20–6.40 秒：
玩家走向中央粉衣站姿角色“令仪”，视角略微仰起。令仪从胸前缓缓放下手，袖口轻扬，微微颔首，回应：“琴音已候你多时。”角色旁出现信息卡：令仪，擅长：琴。

6.40–8.70 秒：
玩家转向右中景蓝衣倚栏角色“杜若”。杜若缓缓转身，手指轻抚袖缘，轻轻点头，回应：“今日墨色正好。”角色旁出现信息卡：杜若，擅长：书。

8.70–12.20 秒：
玩家沿凉亭向左后方移动，经过其他角色时产生明显前后景视差，其他角色只保持轻微呼吸、眨眼、衣袖与发饰摆动。

12.20–14.50 秒：
玩家靠近左后景粉衣回眸角色“采薇”。采薇缓缓回眸，抬手指向水塘与园林景色，回应：“这一园春色，正宜入画。”角色旁出现信息卡：采薇，擅长：画。

14.50–15.00 秒：
玩家缓慢回头，五位角色形成自然前后层次，画面停留在暖色苏式园林、水塘反光与人物群像上，远处传来一声轻柔琴音。

声音设计：
真实脚步声、衣料摩擦声、环佩轻响、水声、风吹帷幔声、远处鸟鸣。每位角色的声音从其所在方向传来，具有空间音频效果。角色台词清晰、轻柔、自然，不要机械播报感。

画面要求：
高沉浸感古风游戏实机演示效果，镜头移动稳定自然，人物面部保持一致，服装与发饰细节稳定，角色动作简单克制，嘴型与台词基本同步，水面、帷幔、树影和衣袖有轻微动态。

避免：
人物换脸，人物数量变化，肢体畸形，角色同时大幅动作，镜头瞬移，镜头穿模，过快转向，过度抖动，字幕乱码，游戏 UI 遮挡人物面部，红色手绘箭头直接出现在成片中。

items.title: 动漫机甲海报生成提示
items.summary: 用于生成高端日系动漫电影海报，突出角色与机械伙伴的史诗感。
items.contentChinese:
I2I 提示词。
照常，你只需要复制下面的提示词，并将其连同你想使用的主角图片一起发送给图像生成 AI。
提示词：
“仅将参考图像用作角色身份、视觉设计、物种、颜色、服装、装备、材质、符号以及整体美学的来源。严格保留角色的脸部、剪影、比例、配色方案、服装风格和标志性特征。不要复制参考图中的原始姿势、表情、动作、手势、镜头角度或构图。
分析角色的个性、职业、情感基调、叙事角色、科技水平和世界观设定。创作一张高端动漫电影感主视觉海报，角色与一个大型机械伙伴（守护单元 / 机械兽 / 人工搭档）共同登场，这个机械伙伴完全依据角色自身的视觉语言、颜色、符号、材质和神话设定来设计。机器人必须感觉像是角色的自然延伸。
构图遵循具有强烈视觉层级的分层日式电影海报结构：
- 上半部分：巨大的象征性肖像——角色的巨幅肖像主宰天空，而机器人的巨大上半身、面部或剪影作为标志性的海报元素，从旁边或背后浮现。
- 下半部分：动态叙事场景，展示角色与机器人在一个全新姿势和互动中共同出现，置于符合其宇宙设定的环境里。设计相称的建筑、光照、氛围和世界观细节。
加入杂志封面美学强化：包含大型风格化字体、装饰性文字元素、发光或金属质感的符号效果、徽章和标志上的全息或光束处理，以及高端图形设计细节，典型于高端动漫杂志封面。保持强烈的视觉层级和电影感冲击力。
风格：超精细现代动漫插画，高端电影感主视觉，精致机械与织物纹理，氛围光照，丰富的世界观构建，分层构图，电影级景深，杰作级质量，清晰对焦，最佳质量。官方动漫宣传海报 / 杂志封面风格。”
items.contentEnglish:
I2I Prompt.
As usual, all you need to do is copy the prompt below and send it to an image generation AI together with a picture of the main character you want to use.
Prompt:
"Use the reference image ONLY as source for the character's identity, visual design, species, colors, outfit, equipment, materials, symbols, and overall aesthetic. Strictly preserve the character's face, silhouette, proportions, color palette, clothing style, and defining features. Do not copy the original pose, expression, action, gesture, camera angle, or composition from the reference.
Analyze the character's personality, profession, emotional tone, narrative role, technology level, and world setting. Create a premium anime cinematic key visual poster featuring the character together with a large robotic companion (guardian unit / mechanical beast / artificial partner) designed entirely from the character's own visual language, colors, symbols, materials, and mythology. The robot must feel like a natural extension of the character.
Composition follows layered Japanese cinematic poster structure with strong visual hierarchy:
- Upper portion: Gigantic symbolic portraits — a massive portrait of the character dominates the sky, while the robot's colossal upper body, face, or silhouette emerges beside or behind it as an iconic poster element.
- Lower portion: Dynamic narrative scene showing the character and robot together in a completely new pose and interaction, set in an environment that matches their universe. Design fitting architecture, lighting, atmosphere, and world-building details.
Enhance with magazine cover aesthetics: include large stylized typography, decorative text elements, glowing or metallic symbol effects, holographic or light-ray treatments on emblems and logos, and high-end graphic design details typical of premium anime magazine covers. Maintain strong visual hierarchy and cinematic impact.
Style: Ultra-detailed modern anime illustration, premium cinematic key visual, intricate mechanical and fabric textures, atmospheric lighting, rich world-building, layered composition, cinematic depth, masterpiece quality, sharp focus, best quality. Official anime promotional poster / magazine cover style."

items.title: 真人漫画融合海报生成
items.summary: 以真人照片为参考，生成东亚女性自拍与少女漫画分镜融合海报。
items.contentChinese:
提示词：
使用上传人物照片作为主体参考，保留人物五官比例、脸型轮廓、鼻梁、嘴唇、眼神气质、发型特征与整体辨识度，不要生成陌生人脸，不要过度美颜，保持真实自然的东亚女性气质。
生成一张真人与漫画融合风格的竖版 2:3 海报。画面前景是一位年轻成年东亚女性，黑色头发用黑色鲨鱼夹自然盘起，几缕碎发垂落在脸侧，穿黑色修身针织长袖上衣，手持手机自拍。人物表情自然柔和，可以微笑、惊讶、回眸或轻轻整理头发，动作要真实不僵硬，身体比例自然。
背景是高质量黑白漫画分镜墙，漫画中的人物也要参考同一个真人形象，保持相同五官、发型、气质和服装特征。背景中央有一张巨大的漫画版人物侧脸特写，周围排布多个小漫画分镜，展示同一人物的不同角度、表情和侧脸。漫画风格为日式少女漫画线稿，黑白高对比，细腻发丝，淡淡腮红线，干净分镜边框，白色背景。
整体画面要像真人站在自己的漫画世界前自拍，真实摄影与黑白漫画自然融合，光线干净柔和，皮肤真实细腻，人物立体清晰，手机在画面边缘可见，构图高级，有杂志海报感，高清细节，电影级质感。
items.contentEnglish:
Prompt:
Using the uploaded portrait photo as the subject reference, preserve the person’s facial proportions, face shape, nose bridge, lips, gaze and expression, hairstyle features, and overall recognizability. Do not generate a stranger’s face, do not over-beautify, and keep a natural, realistic East Asian female look.

Generate a vertical 2:3 poster in a real-person + manga fusion style. The foreground shows a young adult East Asian woman with black hair naturally pinned up with a black shark clip, a few loose strands falling along the sides of her face. She is wearing a black fitted knit long-sleeve top and holding a phone for a selfie. Her expression should be natural and gentle, and she can smile, look surprised, glance back over her shoulder, or lightly adjust her hair. The pose should feel realistic and not stiff, with natural body proportions.

The background is a high-quality black-and-white manga storyboard wall. The characters in the manga should also reference the same real-person image, keeping the same facial features, hairstyle, aura, and clothing traits. In the center of the background there should be a huge manga-style side-profile close-up of the character’s face, surrounded by multiple small manga panels showing the same person from different angles, expressions, and side profiles. The manga style should be Japanese shoujo manga line art, black-and-white with high contrast, delicate strands of hair, subtle blush lines, clean panel borders, and a white background.

The overall image should feel like a real person taking a selfie in her own manga world, with a natural fusion of real photography and black-and-white manga. The lighting should be clean and soft, the skin realistic and delicate, the subject should appear three-dimensional and crisp, the phone should be visible at the edge of the frame, and the composition should feel premium, magazine-poster-like, with high-definition details and cinematic quality.

items.title: 纸上成真戏韵妆造稿
items.summary: 戏曲高定写真风设定稿，展现京剧与昆曲的纸上成真美感。
items.contentChinese:
生成一张《纸上成真 · 戏韵妆造稿》风格图片，4:5 竖版。

主题为【京剧花旦 / 刀马旦 / 昆曲水袖 / 贵妃醉酒】。画面是一张米白色戏曲妆造设定稿纸夹在木质画板上，置于温暖木色工作台。一位写实成年中国女性从纸上自然立起，形成“纸上成真”的视觉效果。

人物为半身偏多构图，脸部清晰、比例较大，直视镜头，有自然高光与互动感。整体写实，皮肤自然有纹理，不要动漫脸、硅胶感或过度磨皮。妆面带戏曲神韵，但偏高定写真风，不要厚重舞台脸或脸谱化。

服饰为东方戏曲高定设计，强调“重与轻”：头饰、珠翠、刺绣、靠旗或宫装结构偏精致厚重；水袖、披帛、纱层偏轻盈飘逸。整体不过度包裹，保留人物张力。

人物上半身明显高于纸面，有真实体积与投影。一只手轻撑纸面，另一只手自然触碰头饰或水袖等元素，姿态自然。

画面过渡：人物主体为完整写实；水袖、披帛、靠旗等可带少量淡彩手绘质感；仅在水袖末端、披帛尾端、裙边一角及右下角保留未完成铅笔线稿。

右下角有一只真实手持铅笔继续绘制。纸面文字与标注均为铅笔手写草稿风（如头饰结构、水袖走势、刺绣说明等），不要印刷体。

桌面可加入色卡、珠翠、花簪、布样、铅笔、针管笔、茶杯等元素。整体风格写实、清晰、高级，具有东方戏曲审美与“纸上成真”的视觉效果。

避免卡通感、塑料感、廉价戏服、人物过小或构图不当、手部畸形、画面低清晰度等问题。
items.contentEnglish:
Generate a 4:5 vertical image in the style of “Paper Becomes Reality · Opera Charm Costume Concept Sketch.”

The theme is [Peking Opera huadan / daomadan / Kunqu water sleeves / Drunken Imperial Concubine]. The image shows an off-white opera costume concept sketch page clipped to a wooden drawing board, placed on a warm wood-toned workbench. A realistic adult Chinese woman naturally rises from the paper, creating the visual effect of “paper becoming reality.”

The character is composed mostly as a half-body portrait, with a clear face and larger proportions, looking directly at the camera, with natural highlights and an engaging presence. The overall style is realistic, with natural skin texture; avoid anime faces, silicone-like skin, or overly smoothed skin. The makeup has the spirit of opera, but leans toward high-end editorial portrait style; avoid heavy stage makeup or mask-like facial painting.

The clothing is an oriental opera haute couture design, emphasizing the contrast between “heavy and light”: headpieces, pearls and jade ornaments, embroidery, battle flags, or palace-gown structures should feel refined and substantial; water sleeves, sashes, and sheer layers should feel light and flowing. The overall look should not be overly wrapped, preserving the character’s tension.

The upper body should stand clearly above the paper, with real volume and shadow. One hand lightly supports the paper surface, while the other naturally touches the headpiece or water sleeves, in a natural pose.

Image transition: the main figure is fully realistic; water sleeves, sashes, and battle flags may include a small amount of soft hand-drawn color texture; only the ends of the water sleeves, the tail of the sash, one corner of the skirt hem, and the lower-right corner should retain unfinished pencil sketch lines.

In the lower-right corner, there is a real hand holding a pencil and continuing to draw. The text and annotations on the paper should all be in pencil handwritten draft style (such as headpiece structure, water sleeve flow, embroidery notes, etc.), not printed text.

The tabletop may include color swatches, pearls and jade ornaments, flower hairpins, fabric samples, pencils, technical pens, teacups, and other elements. The overall style should be realistic, clear, and high-end, with Eastern opera aesthetics and the visual effect of “paper becoming reality.”

Avoid cartoonishness, plastic-like surfaces, cheap costume appearance, overly small figures, poor composition, deformed hands, and low image clarity.
